signalPhrases: What should the project manager do first
A project manager realizes that an email intended for a specific team member has been mistakenly sent to the entire global project team
1.signalAnswer: Mistaken email to the entire global project team with critical feedback — FIRST: acknowledge the mistake and apologize publicly for unintended consequences (Lead accountably).
whyBullets: B is correct: Email gửi nhầm toàn team kèm critical feedback — PM acknowledge mistake và apologize công khai (Lead accountably), không ignore, không bắt xóa mail, không chỉ xin lỗi riêng người nhận.
PMBOK 8: Manage Stakeholder Engagement — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: PMI kỳ vọng PM chủ động và có trách nhiệm (Lead accountably), không bỏ qua vấn đề hay giả định mọi người tự hiểu.
excludeReasons.C: Che giấu lỗi hoặc yêu cầu xóa thông tin không minh bạch; PMBOK 8 nhấn mạnh Lead accountably và quản trị stakeholder.
excludeReasons.D: "Send a private message to the team member apologizing for the critical f…" cùng nhóm thừa nhận lỗi và giải trình minh bạch nhưng lệch trọng tâm — "Acknowledge the mistake and apologize for any unintended consequences.…" sát lỗi truyền thông / thông tin sai hơn.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do to address the SME's concerns and encourage them to join the agile team
The project manager invites the SME to join the agile team to contribute to these iterations
The SME is reluctant because they think that working on a team is demotivating and slows them down, and they want to achieve the highest-quality output possible
2.signalAnswer: SME believes teamwork is demotivating and slows them down while wanting the highest-quality output — misconception about Agile; PM should explain continuous improvement and early feedback loops before EQ coaching, ceremonies, or sponsor escalation.
whyBullets: Signal: SME thinks teamwork is demotivating and slows them down — Agile misconception; PM explains value before ceremonies or escalation.
B is correct: teamwork + continuous improvement + early feedback loops help the expert achieve higher-quality output than working alone — Develop Team + Build an empowered culture.
PMBOK 8 p. 112: when members are unsure how to collaborate, PM assesses team needs and coaches directly (servant leadership), not escalate to sponsor.

excludeReasons.A: Recommending EQ development judges attitude — does not explain why Agile teamwork does not reduce quality.
excludeReasons.C: Assigning retrospective observer role before SME joins the team — explain CI + early feedback first.
excludeReasons.D: Escalating to sponsor for attitude — too heavy; PM coaches and explains value directly first.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do to ensure this virtual team remains engaged
Due to a lack of locally skilled resources, a company employs an internationally dispersed project team that will work virtually
The project manager has never worked with a virtual team and is concerned about engagement
3.signalAnswer: Internationally dispersed virtual team + PM concerned about engagement — recurring check-ins and scheduled meetings sustain connection (Develop Team), not copying a past comms plan or async-only status reports.
whyBullets: Signal: virtual team + engagement concern — PM needs cadence check-ins/meetings, not a one-time kickoff or async-only comms.
D is correct: recurring check-ins keep internationally dispersed team connected and aligned (Develop Team + Build an empowered culture).
PMBOK 8: Develop Team focuses on team interaction and environment — ongoing cadence beats one-off kickoff for sustained engagement.

excludeReasons.A: One kickoff meeting does not sustain ongoing engagement for a new virtual team.
excludeReasons.B: Copying a past team's communications plan ignores current context and team needs.
excludeReasons.C: Async-only status reports lack synchronous interaction needed for a new virtual team.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do first
During a project schedule review meeting, the team identifies that a critical path activity has slipped due to delays from an external vendor
If unaddressed, this delay will push the project completion date beyond the agreed deadline
4.signalAnswer: Stem signals (trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule; vấn đề vendor / procurement) support C: Document the issue and work with the team to identify and implement corrective actions.
whyBullets: C is correct: Ghi nhận/tài liệu hóa quyết định và kết quả — hỗ trợ traceability và lessons learned.
PMBOK 8: Develop Team — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "change control / change request" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần ghi nhận / tài liệu hóa.
excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "leo thang lên cấp trên" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần ghi nhận / tài liệu hóa.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "thông báo một chiều (inform/notify)" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần ghi nhận / tài liệu hóa.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do

5.signalAnswer: Stem signals (trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule) support C: Facilitate a team workshop to clarify roles, decision-making authority, and working agreements, and then consistently reinforce those agreem

excludeReasons.D: Option D (Avoid confrontation by delegating technical decisions entirely to the senior engineers while fo) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Facilitate a team workshop to clarify roles, decision-making authority, and working agreements,) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

whyBullets: C is correct: PM facilitate thảo luận để team/stakeholder cùng giải quyết — Build an empowered culture.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (The project manager closely monitors each team member’s daily tasks to ensure that they comply) does not resolve the stem focus — C (The project manager removes impediments, facilitates collaboration, and empowers the team to de) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (The project manager shields the team from all customer and stakeholder requests until the end o) does not resolve the stem focus — C (The project manager removes impediments, facilitates collaboration, and empowers the team to de) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (The project manager defines detailed technical solutions and assigns tasks based on individual) does not resolve the stem focus — C (The project manager removes impediments, facilitates collaboration, and empowers the team to de) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

excludeReasons.D: Option D (Ask each engineer to submit a written justification and select the cheaper solution.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Facilitate a joint problem‑solving session focusing on requirements and constraints.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do to improve stakeholder engagement
Several key stakeholders from the operations department are frustrated because they feel excluded from early agile activities and only see the project during formal phase‑gate reviews
8.signalAnswer: Stem signals (ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support B: Update the stakeholder engagement plan to include specific hybrid touchpoints for operations stakeholders.
whyBullets: B is correct: Stakeholder mới/thay đổi bối cảnh — PM phân tích stakeholder, xác định nhu cầu thông tin và cập nhật communications plan thay vì thêm ad hoc hay từ chối vì plan cũ chưa liệt kê (miền Stakeholders).
PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Request that the product owner invite operations stakeholders to daily coordination meetings.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Update the stakeholder engagement plan to include specific hybrid touchpoints for operations st) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Ghi nhận lessons learned / cập nhật log là quan trọng nhưng thường là bước sau khi đã xử lý tình huống — không phải hành động ưu tiên khi câu hỏi hỏi FIRST/NEXT. (Câu hỏi hỏi ACTION — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Assign a business analyst to summarize agile outputs for operations stakeholders after each spr) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Update the stakeholder engagement plan to include specific hybrid touchpoints for operations st) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: The team uses a Kanban board and work-in-progress (WIP) limits agreed with stakeholders
During a review, a senior marketing director insists on adding a new “Priority Campaign Landing Page” immediately

Current Kanban Board Snapshot To Do In Progress WIP Limit: 4 Review WIP Limit: 3 Done A: Sign-up form revamp B: Performance analytics C: Mobile navigation fix D: Accessibility improvements E: Content audit F: Email template updates In a recent email, the marketing director says, “Because we are agile, you can just start my landing page now, and we’ll worry about process later
9.signalAnswer: Stakeholder cites agility to bypass agreed WIP limits — PM explains agile teams still maintain governance and WIP limits; start the landing page when capacity is available or priorities change.
whyBullets: Signal: director nói agile = start ngay, process sau — hiểu lầm; WIP limits là governance đã agree với stakeholders.
C đúng: explain agile teams maintain governance and WIP limits; begin landing page khi có capacity hoặc priorities change.
PMBOK 8: agile teams empowered trong guardrails rõ — không phá WIP để chiều stakeholder đột ngột.

excludeReasons.A: Ignore WIP limits để chiều stakeholder — phá governance đã thống nhất; ghi nhận sau iteration không chấp nhận được.
excludeReasons.B: Đẩy item vào To Do và tránh thảo luận — không address misconception agile và không engage stakeholder đúng cách.
excludeReasons.D: Overtime để giữ WIP trên giấy — không bền vững; không thay cho conversation về governance và capacity.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do

with individuals claiming their work is more urgent. The project manager convenes a video meeting to reach a solution everyone can support. Which conflict resolution technique is the project manager demonstrating?

excludeReasons.D: Option D (Limit the stakeholder’s involvement to avoid further distractions.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Re-categorize the stakeholder to adjust the engagement strategy.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do

excludeReasons.C: Ghi nhận lessons learned / cập nhật log là quan trọng nhưng thường là bước sau khi đã xử lý tình huống — không phải hành động ưu tiên khi câu hỏi hỏi FIRST/NEXT. (Câu hỏi hỏi ACTION — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do

excludeReasons.B: Leo thang quá sớm khi PM chưa thử các biện pháp trong phạm vi quyền hạn; chỉ escalate khi vượt quyền hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do

291.signalAnswer: Stem signals (xung đột trong team hoặc stakeholder) support A: Facilitate the meeting by encouraging communication and helping the team members reach a solution they agree on.
whyBullets: A is correct: PM facilitate thảo luận để team/stakeholder cùng giải quyết — Build an empowered culture.
PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Option B (Make a final decision on the resolution without discussion and instruct the team members to fol) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Facilitate the meeting by encouraging communication and helping the team members reach a soluti) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Assign the conflicting team members to separate workstreams to prevent future interaction and r) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Facilitate the meeting by encouraging communication and helping the team members reach a soluti) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Investigate the situation to determine who initiated the conflict and take disciplinary action) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Facilitate the meeting by encouraging communication and helping the team members reach a soluti) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do first to address this conflict
A key team member publicly declares that another team member spoke negatively about them during the last retrospective
The key member threatens to quit if immediate action isn't taken, while other team members are taking sides
Team morale is declining, and project productivity is being affected
292.signalAnswer: Stem signals (xung đột trong team hoặc stakeholder) support A: Meet with both individuals separately to understand each perspective before taking action.
whyBullets: A is correct: PM trao đổi trực tiếp để hiểu vấn đề và cùng tìm hướng xử lý — trước khi sửa baseline hay escalate.
PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Option B (Facilitate a joint meeting with both parties to address the conflict directly.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Meet with both individuals separately to understand each perspective before taking action.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "facilitate retrospective / phân tích root cause" không giải quyết xung đột trong team hoặc stakeholder — đáp án đúng cần họp / thảo luận trực tiếp.
excludeReasons.D: Leo thang quá sớm khi PM chưa thử các biện pháp trong phạm vi quyền hạn; chỉ escalate khi vượt quyền hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
Recent choices to protect schedule and cost reduced transparency about technical compromises and deferred risks
External updates remain positive, while internal teams worry issues may surface after handover
293.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support D: Update closeout communication to outline trade-offs, note residual risks, and confirm readiness.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Manage Project Execution — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Maintain strictly positive messaging to avoid raising concerns.) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Update closeout communication to outline trade-offs, note residual risks, and confirm readiness) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "chờ / trì hoãn" không giải quyết Request formal stakeholder approval to delay handover until all deferred risks are eliminated. — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.C: Ghi nhận lessons learned / cập nhật log là quan trọng nhưng thường là bước sau khi đã xử lý tình huống — không phải hành động ưu tiên khi câu hỏi hỏi FIRST/NEXT. (Câu hỏi hỏi ACTION — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do to improve the daily meeting and avoid misunderstanding
An adaptative project team is globally distributed and the team members speak different primary languages
The project manager is made aware that there are some communication issues
294.signalAnswer: Internationally dispersed virtual team + PM concerned about engagement — recurring check-ins and scheduled meetings sustain connection (Develop Team), not copying a past comms plan or async-only status reports.
whyBullets: Signal: virtual team + engagement concern — PM needs cadence check-ins/meetings, not a one-time kickoff or async-only comms.
D is correct: recurring check-ins keep internationally dispersed team connected and aligned (Develop Team + Build an empowered culture).
PMBOK 8: Develop Team focuses on team interaction and environment — ongoing cadence beats one-off kickoff for sustained engagement.

excludeReasons.A: One kickoff meeting does not sustain ongoing engagement for a new virtual team.
excludeReasons.C: Async-only status reports lack synchronous interaction needed for a new virtual team.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Ask all team members to report on work completed, upcoming work, and blockers.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Use an electronic task board to give a visual representation of work status and progress.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
A project team relies on an AI tool to recommend delivery options, optimizing cost and schedule using historical data
However, new suppliers and changing regulations pose risks the AI may underestimate, according to experienced team members
Senior stakeholders are seeking a prompt recommendation based on the AI's input
295.signalAnswer: Stem signals (vấn đề vendor / procurement; đạo đức / tuân thủ) support A: Incorporate expert feedback on integration and regulatory risks before delivering the AI-based recommendation.
whyBullets: A is correct: PM đảm bảo tuân thủ policy/regulation — Governance và Lead accountably.
PMBOK 8: Develop Schedule — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Option B (Accept the AI recommendation as is, citing its proven reliability to meet stakeholder expectati) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Incorporate expert feedback on integration and regulatory risks before delivering the AI-based) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Reject the use of the AI tool and rely solely on expert judgment for the delivery recommendatio) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Incorporate expert feedback on integration and regulatory risks before delivering the AI-based) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "chờ / trì hoãn" không giải quyết vấn đề vendor / procurement — đáp án đúng cần đảm bảo tuân thủ / compliance.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do to handle the situation effectively
A project manager has been hired to lead a multinational program involving several teams distributed across different time zones
Some team members prefer short weekly summaries, while others expect detailed daily updates
However, a communication management plan was developed and approved during project initiation
296.signalAnswer: Stem signals (xung đột trong team hoặc stakeholder; team phân tán / virtual) support A: Remind the team that the approved communication management plan defines the expected reporting approach.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Option B (Change the status reporting format to accommodate the preferences of all team members.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Remind the team that the approved communication management plan defines the expected reporting) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Leo thang quá sớm khi PM chưa thử các biện pháp trong phạm vi quyền hạn; chỉ escalate khi vượt quyền hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "yêu cầu team hành động (chưa rõ facilitation)" không giải quyết xung đột trong team hoặc stakeholder — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do to address this situation
During a software development project, the team discovers that several features do not meet quality expectations
After being asked to resolve the issues, a developer expresses frustration, arguing that unclear requirements are to blame
Other team members point to insufficient testing, while testers claim poor code quality is the root cause
297.signalAnswer: Stem signals (vấn đề chất lượng / defect; mức độ uncertainty cao) support A: Support the team in a retrospective to collaboratively identify the root cause of quality issues.
whyBullets: A is correct: Vấn đề lặp lại/quality — retrospective phân tích root cause và cải tiến hệ thống, không blame cá nhân.
PMBOK 8: Develop Team — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Đánh giá cá nhân thay vì systemic improvement qua retro.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Conduct quality reviews at each phase of the development cycle to locate quality failures.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Support the team in a retrospective to collaboratively identify the root cause of quality issue) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Leo thang quá sớm khi PM chưa thử các biện pháp trong phạm vi quyền hạn; chỉ escalate khi vượt quyền hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do to address this situation
A senior team member was highly influential and played a critical role in previous projects
The project manager is concerned that this may affect team morale and overall performance
298.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support D: Schedule a one-on-one conversation to understand concerns and explore ways to re-engage.
whyBullets: D is correct: Member/stakeholder cần được lắng nghe và hỗ trợ cụ thể trước — servant leadership, Build an empowered culture.
PMBOK 8: Plan Resources — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Hold a team discussion to explore ideas for increasing engagement and motivation.) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Schedule a one-on-one conversation to understand concerns and explore ways to re-engage.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.B: Khuyến khích bằng incentive có thể tạo hành vi lệch (sửa bug để được thưởng) thay vì cải thiện hệ thống và root cause thực sự.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Request the functional manager to discuss role expectations with the team member.) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Schedule a one-on-one conversation to understand concerns and explore ways to re-engage.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
During a product backlog refinement meeting, a stakeholder from the legal department and the product owner disagree on the prioritization of a particular item

The product owner states that the current prioritization is adding maximum value to the project, and the stakeholder states that the item should be prioritized because it is a governmental compliance requirement
299.signalAnswer: Stem signals (xung đột trong team hoặc stakeholder; ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support D: Facilitate a discussion between the product owner and the stakeholder to discuss their perspectives and concerns.
whyBullets: D is correct: PM facilitate thảo luận để team/stakeholder cùng giải quyết — Build an empowered culture.
PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "ưu tiên theo giá trị / MVP" không giải quyết xung đột trong team hoặc stakeholder — đáp án đúng cần họp / thảo luận trực tiếp.
excludeReasons.B: Ghi nhận lessons learned / cập nhật log là quan trọng nhưng thường là bước sau khi đã xử lý tình huống — không phải hành động ưu tiên khi câu hỏi hỏi FIRST/NEXT. (Câu hỏi hỏi ACTION — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "engagement stakeholder / làm rõ kỳ vọng" không giải quyết xung đột trong team hoặc stakeholder — đáp án đúng cần họp / thảo luận trực tiếp.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do next
During an iteration review meeting, a couple of key stakeholders enter into a heated discussion about the prototype's capabilities
300.signalAnswer: Stem signals (ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support B: Identify the source of the conflict between the stakeholders and address the issue.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Manage Stakeholder Engagement — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "cùng phát triển giải pháp / collaborate" không giải quyết ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (List the positives and negatives of the situation to determine the impact of this conflict.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Identify the source of the conflict between the stakeholders and address the issue.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "engagement stakeholder / làm rõ kỳ vọng" không giải quyết ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.

signalPhrases: What should a project manager do
A project team has full access to all project-related data, including visual data such as the Gantt chart, prioritization matrix, story map, and other inputs
However, a project team member repeatedly requests more granular details on a work package than the Gantt chart indicates
The Gantt chart is confirmed to be comprehensive and current, and the other project team members feel that the current Gantt chart is sufficiently detailed
301.signalAnswer: Stem signals (trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule) support B: Ensure that the team member understands the granular information retrieval process.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Develop Schedule — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Create a new communication channel with granular updates.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Ensure that the team member understands the granular information retrieval process.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Remind the project team member that the Gantt chart was the agreed upon format.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Ensure that the team member understands the granular information retrieval process.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: PMI kỳ vọng PM chủ động và có trách nhiệm (Lead accountably), không bỏ qua vấn đề hay giả định mọi người tự hiểu.

signalPhrases: The project team cannot agree on which process to use when solving a specific problem
What approach should the project manager take to help bring the team to consensus
302.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support D: Facilitate a meeting and encourage team members to come up with potential solutions.
whyBullets: D is correct: PM facilitate thảo luận để team/stakeholder cùng giải quyết — Build an empowered culture.
PMBOK 8: Develop Team — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Exert expert authority and define the path forward for the team.) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Facilitate a meeting and encourage team members to come up with potential solutions.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.B: Leo thang quá sớm khi PM chưa thử các biện pháp trong phạm vi quyền hạn; chỉ escalate khi vượt quyền hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Assign a new team lead who has experience in solving similar software development problems.) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Facilitate a meeting and encourage team members to come up with potential solutions.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do next
A project manager is leading a team of software engineers developing a mobile app for a retail client
While the team consistently meets sprint deadlines, recent customer feedback has revealed an increase in usability issues and post-release defects
The project manager suspects the decline in quality is due to skill gaps within the team
303.signalAnswer: Stem signals (trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule; vấn đề chất lượng / defect) support C: Conduct a skills gap analysis to identify specific training needs and provide targeted training.
whyBullets: C is correct: PM coach/phát triển năng lực thay vì thay thế hoặc đánh giá/punish — phát triển bền vững.
PMBOK 8: Manage Stakeholder Engagement — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Recruit an experienced senior team member to the team to offset performance issues.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Conduct a skills gap analysis to identify specific training needs and provide targeted training) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "bổ sung nguồn lực / hire" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần coaching / phát triển năng lực.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Implement a stricter performance evaluation system to hold team members accountable.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Conduct a skills gap analysis to identify specific training needs and provide targeted training) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do to ensure the smooth delivery of the project
During a multidisciplinary project, a project manager learns that there are many conflicts about design among team members from different disciplines
304.signalAnswer: Stem signals (xung đột trong team hoặc stakeholder) support D: Facilitate team discussions to achieve the desired results.
whyBullets: D is correct: PM facilitate thảo luận để team/stakeholder cùng giải quyết — Build an empowered culture.
PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Identify the matter as a risk and check available budget reserves.) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Facilitate team discussions to achieve the desired results.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Ensure that the project sponsor is aware of the current situation.) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Facilitate team discussions to achieve the desired results.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Leo thang quá sớm khi PM chưa thử các biện pháp trong phạm vi quyền hạn; chỉ escalate khi vượt quyền hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do to address team morale
A project is nearing delivery, and the team is worried about losing their jobs
Team morale is very low, and the project manager is experiencing increased delivery delays from the team
305.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support B: Provide transparent updates on available information and facilitate open team discussions.
whyBullets: B is correct: PM facilitate thảo luận để team/stakeholder cùng giải quyết — Build an empowered culture.
PMBOK 8: Develop Schedule — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "lắng nghe và hỗ trợ cá nhân" không giải quyết Schedule individual meetings with team members to understand and address concerns. — đáp án đúng cần thừa nhận lỗi và giải trình minh bạch.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Focus the team’s attention on project deliverables to minimize worrying about changes.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Provide transparent updates on available information and facilitate open team discussions.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Leo thang quá sớm khi PM chưa thử các biện pháp trong phạm vi quyền hạn; chỉ escalate khi vượt quyền hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên.

signalPhrases: What should the agile project manager do to address this situation sustainably
An agile team member with strong technical skills but limited domain expertise is consistently struggling with complex user stories requiring deep business knowledge
The team member's velocity is declining, affecting sprint commitments
Other team members are compensating by taking on additional work, creating potential burnout risks
The product owner is concerned about story quality and acceptance criteria understanding
306.signalAnswer: Stem signals (thành viên quá tải hoặc bất mãn; vấn đề chất lượng / defect) support D: Adjust story complexity assignments based on expertise while developing cross-training plans.
whyBullets: D is correct: PM coach/phát triển năng lực thay vì thay thế hoặc đánh giá/punish — phát triển bền vững.
PMBOK 8: Develop Team — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Implement pair programming sessions between the struggling member and experienced teammates.) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Adjust story complexity assignments based on expertise while developing cross-training plans.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.B: "Arrange formal domain training while temporarily redistributing complex …" cùng nhóm coaching / phát triển năng lực nhưng lệch trọng tâm — "Adjust story complexity assignments based on expertise while developing …" sát thành viên quá tải hoặc bất mãn hơn.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Facilitate knowledge sharing sessions where stakeholders explain domain concepts.) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Adjust story complexity assignments based on expertise while developing cross-training plans.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
A project manager is assembling a team with a mix of new and experienced team members
The project manager finds out that there are issues with team cohesion
The experienced team members believe new team members lack the technical skills required to perform the necessary work and expect that they will have to compensate for their inexperience
307.signalAnswer: Stem signals (team mới hình thành) support B: Analyze the skills of all team members, identify gaps, and develop plans to address them.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Plan Resources — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Khuyến khích bằng incentive có thể tạo hành vi lệch (sửa bug để được thưởng) thay vì cải thiện hệ thống và root cause thực sự.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Reassign new team members to projects that better align with their skills and experience.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Analyze the skills of all team members, identify gaps, and develop plans to address them.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Explain that professional project team members are expected to resolve issues without intervent) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Analyze the skills of all team members, identify gaps, and develop plans to address them.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do

After the project kick-off meeting, a critical resource approaches the project manager to share concerns about their ability to complete assigned tasks due to competing priorities from another high-visibility project
The resource’s role is essential for meeting near-term milestones, and delays could impact the critical path
308.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support A: Meet with the resource and team to assess workload, adjust priorities, and agree on a feasible plan.
whyBullets: A is correct: PM trao đổi trực tiếp để hiểu vấn đề và cùng tìm hướng xử lý — trước khi sửa baseline hay escalate.
PMBOK 8: Develop Schedule — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Ghi nhận lessons learned / cập nhật log là quan trọng nhưng thường là bước sau khi đã xử lý tình huống — không phải hành động ưu tiên khi câu hỏi hỏi FIRST/NEXT. (Câu hỏi hỏi ACTION — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Engage the sponsor to help resolve the resource conflict with higher-level management.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Meet with the resource and team to assess workload, adjust priorities, and agree on a feasible) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Rebaseline/sửa plan trước khi thảo luận scope với stakeholder/sponsor.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do first
During a daily scrum, several team members openly express frustration about how tasks are assigned, claiming that the same people are repeatedly overloaded while others have fewer responsibilities
This has been an ongoing issue despite previous discussions, and morale is declining
If not addressed, the conflict could impact sprint commitments and overall team performance
309.signalAnswer: Stem signals (xung đột trong team hoặc stakeholder; ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support C: Facilitate a team session to analyze workload distribution and agree on improvements
whyBullets: C is correct: PM facilitate thảo luận để team/stakeholder cùng giải quyết — Build an empowered culture.
PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Review the resource management plan to confirm how task assignments should be handled.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Facilitate a team session to analyze workload distribution and agree on improvements) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Seek advice from other project managers on how to resolve recurring workload conflicts.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Facilitate a team session to analyze workload distribution and agree on improvements) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "team building / hoạt động nhóm" không giải quyết xung đột trong team hoặc stakeholder — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.

signalPhrases: What should the focus of the meeting be
Before kickoff, the project manager is scheduled to meet the overseas office leader
310.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support A: Informing the overseas office leader of the project’s strategic value, key deliverables, and their expected involvement.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "quản lý vendor / procurement" không giải quyết Reaching an agreement on the choice of procurement strategies to be employed by the overseas office. — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Assisting the overseas office leader in communicating with the corporate headquarters stakehold) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Informing the overseas office leader of the project’s strategic value, key deliverables, and th) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "thông báo / truyền đạt thông tin" không giải quyết Identifying and assigning a subject matter expert (SME) to represent the project at the overseas office. — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.

signalPhrases: What should the experienced project manager tell the new project manager to do next
An experienced project manager is mentoring a new project manager assigned to their first project
As the new project manager prepares for the project, they are overwhelmed by the number of stakeholders identified by the team
311.signalAnswer: Stem signals (thành viên quá tải hoặc bất mãn) support A: Perform a stakeholder analysis to determine the relative importance.
whyBullets: A is correct: PM phân tích stakeholder trước khi điều chỉnh engagement/truyền thông — quyết định dựa trên nhu cầu thực tế, không giả định.
PMBOK 8: Develop Team — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Option B (Categorize key stakeholders using a workbook register.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Perform a stakeholder analysis to determine the relative importance.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: "Update the communications management plan with stakeholder preferences.…" cùng nhóm phân tích stakeholder và cập nhật kế hoạch truyền thông nhưng lệch trọng tâm — "Perform a stakeholder analysis to determine the relative importance.…" sát thành viên quá tải hoặc bất mãn hơn.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "ưu tiên theo giá trị / MVP" không giải quyết thành viên quá tải hoặc bất mãn — đáp án đúng cần phân tích stakeholder và cập nhật kế hoạch truyền thông.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
While working on a long and dynamic project, a team member informs the project manager that some users are dissatisfied with features released in the previous iteration
312.signalAnswer: Stem signals (ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support B: Collect feedback from stakeholders and discuss with the team to gain insights.
whyBullets: B is correct: PM trao đổi trực tiếp để hiểu vấn đề và cùng tìm hướng xử lý — trước khi sửa baseline hay escalate.
PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Review individual responsibilities to prevent confusion within the delivery team.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Collect feedback from stakeholders and discuss with the team to gain insights.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "thông báo một chiều (inform/notify)" không giải quyết ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum — đáp án đúng cần họp / thảo luận trực tiếp.
excludeReasons.D: Ghi nhận lessons learned / cập nhật log là quan trọng nhưng thường là bước sau khi đã xử lý tình huống — không phải hành động ưu tiên khi câu hỏi hỏi FIRST/NEXT. (Câu hỏi hỏi ACTION — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do next
A six-week project is underway, and during the first few days of execution, the team encounters a major impediment
The project manager works with the team to resolve the issue and unexpectedly discovers a solution that allows the project to be completed in just three weeks
313.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support A: Engage with stakeholders to evaluate the new opportunity and decide next steps.
whyBullets: A is correct: PM chủ động engagement stakeholder: làm rõ kỳ vọng, nhu cầu thông tin và thống nhất hướng xử lý.
PMBOK 8: Develop Team — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Option B (Revise the scope to add more deliverables that fill the remaining timeline.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Engage with stakeholders to evaluate the new opportunity and decide next steps.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Tiếp tục mà chưa align kỳ vọng stakeholder.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Reassign available team members to other initiatives to improve utilization.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Engage with stakeholders to evaluate the new opportunity and decide next steps.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do to address this issue

During the second month of a hybrid project to develop a digital customer portal, the project manager observes a pattern: the product owner often misses key refinement sessions, provides vague feedback on deliverables, and is unresponsive to team questions
As a result, the development team struggles to understand priorities, and the planned business value is at risk
314.signalAnswer: Stem signals (ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support C: Review and revise the stakeholder engagement strategy to improve collaboration with the product owner.
whyBullets: C is correct: PM chủ động engagement stakeholder: làm rõ kỳ vọng, nhu cầu thông tin và thống nhất hướng xử lý.
PMBOK 8: Manage Stakeholder Engagement — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Leo thang quá sớm khi PM chưa thử các biện pháp trong phạm vi quyền hạn; chỉ escalate khi vượt quyền hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên.
excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "ưu tiên theo giá trị / MVP" không giải quyết ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum — đáp án đúng cần engagement stakeholder / làm rõ kỳ vọng.
excludeReasons.D: Trong môi trường Agile/Hybrid, PMBOK 8 khuyến khích Build an empowered culture — PM định hướng và loại bỏ impediment, không micromanage giải pháp.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager have done earlier to ensure that training was effective
A project team is preparing to roll out a new enterprise software across multiple departments
The project manager arranged for all team members to complete a standard video-based training module before the pilot phase
Despite full attendance, several team members report confusion and errors during the first deployment attempt
The project manager is concerned about delays and quality issues if this continues
315.signalAnswer: Stem signals (vấn đề chất lượng / defect) support A: Follow up the training with practical exercises and measured performance results.
whyBullets: A is correct: PM coach/phát triển năng lực thay vì thay thế hoặc đánh giá/punish — phát triển bền vững.
PMBOK 8: Plan Resources — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: "Request department managers to verify that all employees completed the t…" cùng nhóm coaching / phát triển năng lực nhưng lệch trọng tâm — "Follow up the training with practical exercises and measured performance…" sát vấn đề chất lượng / defect hơn.
excludeReasons.C: Ghi nhận lessons learned / cập nhật log là quan trọng nhưng thường là bước sau khi đã xử lý tình huống — không phải hành động ưu tiên khi câu hỏi hỏi FIRST/NEXT. (Câu hỏi hỏi FIRST — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "leo thang lên cấp trên" không giải quyết vấn đề chất lượng / defect — đáp án đúng cần coaching / phát triển năng lực.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do to address this situation effectively
A key stakeholder who previously received regular updates suddenly calls to complain about lack of progress visibility
Upon investigation, the project manager discovers this stakeholder recently changed roles and now requires different information types and frequency than originally planned
Other stakeholders are satisfied with current communications, but this stakeholder's new position gives them significant influence over project funding decisions
316.signalAnswer: Stem signals (vấn đề chi phí / ngân sách; stakeholder không hài lòng / kỳ vọng lệch) support A: Conduct stakeholder analysis to assess the impact of the role change on communication needs.
whyBullets: A is correct: Trước khi đồng ý thay đổi, PM đánh giá impact lên scope/schedule/cost/risk — không quyết định mù quáng.
PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: "Review and update the communications management plan to reflect new stak…" cùng nhóm phân tích stakeholder và cập nhật kế hoạch truyền thông nhưng lệch trọng tâm — "Conduct stakeholder analysis to assess the impact of the role change on …" sát vấn đề chi phí / ngân sách hơn.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Schedule individual meetings with the stakeholder to understand their new information needs.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Conduct stakeholder analysis to assess the impact of the role change on communication needs.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Evaluate current communication effectiveness across all stakeholders before making changes.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Conduct stakeholder analysis to assess the impact of the role change on communication needs.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager have done to prevent this conflict from occurring
As a project is nearing completion, a struggle between the product owner and the project sponsor regarding who owns the benefits derived from the deliverable becomes a matter of litigation
317.signalAnswer: Stem signals (xung đột trong team hoặc stakeholder; ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support B: Developed and approved the business case with the product owner and the project sponsor.
whyBullets: B is correct: PM tra artifact/plan đã có (tài liệu dự án) để quyết định có căn cứ, không phản ứng tùy hứng.
PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Recognized the project sponsor as a stakeholder during the project’s initiation phase.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Developed and approved the business case with the product owner and the project sponsor.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: "Identified and captured any potential issues in the issue log and monito…" cùng nhóm tham chiếu artifact / kế hoạch đã có nhưng lệch trọng tâm — "Developed and approved the business case with the product owner and the …" sát xung đột trong team hoặc stakeholder hơn.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Created a detailed work breakdown structure (WBS) and implemented systematic tracking.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Developed and approved the business case with the product owner and the project sponsor.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do first to address this participation issue

The project manager of an agile project notices that key stakeholders are consistently skipping iteration planning and review meetings, stating they don't see the value and prefer email updates instead

The team is frustrated by the absence of stakeholder input during critical planning sessions
318.signalAnswer: Stem signals (thiếu hụt nguồn lực / kỹ năng; ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support B: Identify knowledge gaps and provide targeted coaching to stakeholders on agile methodology benefits.
whyBullets: B is correct: PM coach/phát triển năng lực thay vì thay thế hoặc đánh giá/punish — phát triển bền vững.
PMBOK 8: Develop Team — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Assess stakeholder communication preferences and adapt meeting formats to increase engagement.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Identify knowledge gaps and provide targeted coaching to stakeholders on agile methodology bene) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Implement alternative feedback mechanisms such as recorded sessions and asynchronous collaborat) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Identify knowledge gaps and provide targeted coaching to stakeholders on agile methodology bene) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: "Develop stakeholder training programs and establish clear participation …" cùng nhóm coaching / phát triển năng lực nhưng lệch trọng tâm — "Identify knowledge gaps and provide targeted coaching to stakeholders on…" sát thiếu hụt nguồn lực / kỹ năng hơn.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager have done to prevent this complaint

a project manager demonstrates how to use one of the products to a subset of a client's employees through a 30-minute virtual conference call. The client's employees complain that a two-day workshop would have been more effective for training. What should the project manager have done to prevent this complaint?
As part of a project deliverable
319.signalAnswer: Internationally dispersed virtual team + PM concerned about engagement — recurring check-ins and scheduled meetings sustain connection (Develop Team), not copying a past comms plan or async-only status reports.
whyBullets: Signal: virtual team + engagement concern — PM needs cadence check-ins/meetings, not a one-time kickoff or async-only comms.
D is correct: recurring check-ins keep internationally dispersed team connected and aligned (Develop Team + Build an empowered culture).
PMBOK 8: Develop Team focuses on team interaction and environment — ongoing cadence beats one-off kickoff for sustained engagement.

excludeReasons.B: Copying a past team's communications plan ignores current context and team needs.
excludeReasons.C: Async-only status reports lack synchronous interaction needed for a new virtual team.
excludeReasons.D: "Developed an asynchronous training plan.…" cùng nhóm coaching / phát triển năng lực nhưng lệch trọng tâm — "Assessed the training needs of the client's employees.…" sát team phân tán / virtual hơn.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
A project manager is assigned to a new strategic initiative with multiple high-level stakeholders from different departments
Each stakeholder has provided their expectations for the project, but the project manager identifies several conflicts between scope priorities, delivery timelines, and success criteria
Without alignment, the project risks delays and dissatisfaction from key stakeholders
320.signalAnswer: Stem signals (stakeholder không hài lòng / kỳ vọng lệch; xung đột trong team hoặc stakeholder) support A: Facilitate a collaborative session with stakeholders to discuss and resolve conflicting expectations.
whyBullets: A is correct: PM facilitate thảo luận để team/stakeholder cùng giải quyết — Build an empowered culture.
PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "ưu tiên theo giá trị / MVP" không giải quyết stakeholder không hài lòng / kỳ vọng lệch — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.C: Ghi nhận lessons learned / cập nhật log là quan trọng nhưng thường là bước sau khi đã xử lý tình huống — không phải hành động ưu tiên khi câu hỏi hỏi FIRST/NEXT. (Câu hỏi hỏi ACTION — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "ưu tiên theo giá trị / MVP" không giải quyết stakeholder không hài lòng / kỳ vọng lệch — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do first
During the project, the project manager discovers that a stakeholder is submitting inaccurate status reports to the steering committee due to a lack of correct project information
321.signalAnswer: Stem signals (thiếu hụt nguồn lực / kỹ năng) support B: Schedule a meeting with the stakeholder to address the inaccurate reporting and clarify project details.
whyBullets: B is correct: PM trao đổi trực tiếp để hiểu vấn đề và cùng tìm hướng xử lý — trước khi sửa baseline hay escalate.
PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "phân tích stakeholder và cập nhật kế hoạch truyền thông" không giải quyết thiếu hụt nguồn lực / kỹ năng — đáp án đúng cần họp / thảo luận trực tiếp.
excludeReasons.C: Escalate trước khi meet/facilitate ở cấp PM.
excludeReasons.D: Leo thang quá sớm khi PM chưa thử các biện pháp trong phạm vi quyền hạn; chỉ escalate khi vượt quyền hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do to address this accelerated timeline
An agile project team is building a website for a client with a planned six-month timeline

322.signalAnswer: Stem signals (ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support A: Collaborate with the product owner to reprioritize the backlog and focus on minimum viable features.
whyBullets: A is correct: PM khuyến khích collaboration / hợp tác để xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi — phù hợp miền Stakeholders + Scope, Focus Area Executing (PMBOK 8).
PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "engagement stakeholder / làm rõ kỳ vọng" không giải quyết ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum — đáp án đúng cần khuyến khích collaboration / hợp tác.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "ưu tiên theo giá trị / MVP" không giải quyết ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum — đáp án đúng cần khuyến khích collaboration / hợp tác.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Implement sprint compression techniques and increase team velocity to deliver full scope early.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Collaborate with the product owner to reprioritize the backlog and focus on minimum viable feat) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do first

A functional manager involved in a project expresses concerns that the quality metrics reports from recent iterations don't accurately reflect the team's actual performance and may mislead stakeholders about project health
The development team believes their quality metrics are comprehensive and accurately represent their work quality

323.signalAnswer: Stem signals (vấn đề chất lượng / defect; xung đột trong team hoặc stakeholder) support B: Meet with the functional manager to understand their concerns and gather feedback about reporting issues.

PMBOK 8: Develop Team — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Review and adjust quality metrics reports to address the functional manager's specific concerns) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Meet with the functional manager to understand their concerns and gather feedback about reporti) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "đảm bảo chất lượng / kiểm soát quality" không giải quyết vấn đề chất lượng / defect — đáp án đúng cần lắng nghe và hỗ trợ cá nhân.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "đảm bảo tuân thủ / compliance" không giải quyết vấn đề chất lượng / defect — đáp án đúng cần lắng nghe và hỗ trợ cá nhân.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do to increase the chances of success by using this approach
Due to market changes, a company decided to speed up its product release schedule, moving from yearly cycles to quarterly cycles
324.signalAnswer: Stem signals (ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support B: Review the product backlog to identify some quick wins to present to stakeholders.
whyBullets: B is correct: PM thông báo / truyền đạt thông tin để xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi — phù hợp miền Stakeholders + Finance, Focus Area Executing (PMBOK 8).
PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "bổ sung nguồn lực / hire" không giải quyết ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum — đáp án đúng cần thông báo / truyền đạt thông tin.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Invite upper management to attend a digital transformation workshop.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Review the product backlog to identify some quick wins to present to stakeholders.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Have the project team work virtually and use the cost savings to speed up delivery.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Review the product backlog to identify some quick wins to present to stakeholders.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do to prevent this situation in the future
During a one-year project, a team delivered everything as requested and defined by the product owner and met all of the sprint goals

325.signalAnswer: Stem signals (ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support D: Conduct periodic reviews with customer involvement.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Manage Stakeholder Engagement — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Hold a kick-off meeting at the beginning of the project.) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Conduct periodic reviews with customer involvement.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Improve application of test automation techniques.) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Conduct periodic reviews with customer involvement.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Increase project management office (PMO) involvement.) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Conduct periodic reviews with customer involvement.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do to increase the chances of achieving the sprint goal

During a standup meeting, the project manager discovers that one of the software developers is struggling to complete work because they lack experience with automation testing, potentially affecting the sprint goal

326.signalAnswer: Stem signals (vấn đề chất lượng / defect; ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support C: Ask the quality assurance engineer to assist the software developer as soon as possible.
whyBullets: C is correct: Embed quality: kiểm soát/prevent defect sớm, không để quality fail ở cuối pipeline.
PMBOK 8: Manage Stakeholder Engagement — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Reassign the automation work to the engineer as soon as the presentation is finished.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Ask the quality assurance engineer to assist the software developer as soon as possible.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.B: "Immediately train the software developer on automation testing and then …" cùng nhóm đảm bảo chất lượng / kiểm soát quality nhưng lệch trọng tâm — "Ask the quality assurance engineer to assist the software developer as s…" sát vấn đề chất lượng / defect hơn.
excludeReasons.D: "Reschedule the automation testing for when the quality assurance enginee…" cùng nhóm đảm bảo chất lượng / kiểm soát quality nhưng lệch trọng tâm — "Ask the quality assurance engineer to assist the software developer as s…" sát vấn đề chất lượng / defect hơn.

signalPhrases: A key team member who developed critical security modules is leaving the organization, and a new team member is taking over their responsibilities
The new team member discovers that several security components were marked as complete and signed-off, but lack proper documentation and cannot be validated against compliance standards
How should the project manager address this knowledge gap and compliance risk
327.signalAnswer: Stem signals (team mới hình thành; đạo đức / tuân thủ) support C: Prioritize immediate knowledge transfer sessions between outgoing and incoming team members.

PMBOK 8: Manage Project Execution — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Ghi nhận lessons learned / cập nhật log là quan trọng nhưng thường là bước sau khi đã xử lý tình huống — không phải hành động ưu tiên khi câu hỏi hỏi FIRST/NEXT. (Câu hỏi hỏi ACTION — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Conduct comprehensive technical review with new team member to identify gaps before proceeding.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Prioritize immediate knowledge transfer sessions between outgoing and incoming team members.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Ghi nhận lessons learned / cập nhật log là quan trọng nhưng thường là bước sau khi đã xử lý tình huống — không phải hành động ưu tiên khi câu hỏi hỏi FIRST/NEXT. (Câu hỏi hỏi ACTION — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
After completing in-person training on complex organizational processes, several agile team members express difficulty retaining the information

PMBOK 8: Develop Team — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Encourage team members to pair up and review key concepts together as part of daily collaborati) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Develop a visual reference tool with essential training content and display it for easy access) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: "Allow team members to reattend the full training session even if it affe…" cùng nhóm coaching / phát triển năng lực nhưng lệch trọng tâm — "Develop a visual reference tool with essential training content and disp…" sát ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum hơn.
excludeReasons.D: Trong môi trường Agile/Hybrid, PMBOK 8 khuyến khích Build an empowered culture — PM định hướng và loại bỏ impediment, không micromanage giải pháp.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager have done to avoid this situation
The project manager of a software development project for a financial institution realizes that team members are unusually delayed on their assigned tasks
The project manager has not experienced this before on earlier projects
After further investigation, the project manager determined that the delays were linked to the recent resignation of an experienced team member
329.signalAnswer: Stem signals (vấn đề chi phí / ngân sách) support C: Identified competency risks and developed a mitigation plan.
whyBullets: C is correct: PM coach/phát triển năng lực thay vì thay thế hoặc đánh giá/punish — phát triển bền vững.
PMBOK 8: Plan Resources — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Ensured there was a well-defined path to promotion.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Identified competency risks and developed a mitigation plan.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Provided continuous guidance to project team members.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Identified competency risks and developed a mitigation plan.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: "Scheduled periodic training for all project team members.…" cùng nhóm coaching / phát triển năng lực nhưng lệch trọng tâm — "Identified competency risks and developed a mitigation plan.…" sát vấn đề chi phí / ngân sách hơn.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
During execution of a multi-stakeholder healthcare IT program, the customer’s project manager resigns without a transition plan

330.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support A: Analyze stakeholder impact, revise the communication strategy, and update the communications plan.

PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Leo thang quá sớm khi PM chưa thử các biện pháp trong phạm vi quyền hạn; chỉ escalate khi vượt quyền hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "chỉ đạo cứng / ra lệnh" không giải quyết Revert to direct email communications with the affected stakeholders until a new project contact is assigned. — đáp án đúng cần phân tích stakeholder và cập nhật kế hoạch truyền thông.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Conduct an emergency status meeting with the customer’s leadership to re-establish communicatio) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Analyze stakeholder impact, revise the communication strategy, and update the communications pl) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
An urban hotel design project involves a globally distributed, multidisciplinary team with diverse cultural backgrounds, working across multiple time zones
