excludeReasons.A: Leo thang quá sớm khi PM chưa thử các biện pháp trong phạm vi quyền hạn; chỉ escalate khi vượt quyền hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Engage the project management office (PMO) since they identify the approach for delivering proj) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Educate the team members on agile and the benefits associated with the use of agile principles.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Change to a predictive approach to be aligned with the skills of the team members.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Educate the team members on agile and the benefits associated with the use of agile principles.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
A project is in progress with team members based in two different countries, and tensions have arisen
Team members from Country A feel that those from Country B are slow to respond and frequently unavailable due to scheduled time off
Meanwhile, team members from Country B value work-life balance and feel that decisions are being made without sufficient consideration
353.signalAnswer: Stem signals (xung đột trong team hoặc stakeholder; team phân tán / virtual) support A: Revisit the team charter with all members.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Option B (Revisit the communications management plan.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Revisit the team charter with all members.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Remind team members to consider cultural differences.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Revisit the team charter with all members.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Review the root cause of the misunderstandings.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Revisit the team charter with all members.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do next
Several team members recently exited the project, including the only individual with a specific critical skill
At the beginning of a new sprint, the project manager identifies a task requiring this missing skill
354.signalAnswer: Stem signals (thiếu hụt nguồn lực / kỹ năng; ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support B: Assess the impact of the missing skill on the project.
whyBullets: B is correct: Trước khi đồng ý thay đổi, PM đánh giá impact lên scope/schedule/cost/risk — không quyết định mù quáng.
PMBOK 8: Plan Resources — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Thay đổi phạm vi cần quy trình change control và thống nhất stakeholder — không phải phản ứng mặc định khi gặp trở ngại.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "chờ / trì hoãn" không giải quyết thiếu hụt nguồn lực / kỹ năng — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Reassign the task to another project team with the necessary skills.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Assess the impact of the missing skill on the project.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do to proactively mitigate this risk
A project manager identifies that the team may lack proficiency in a key technology required for project success
355.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support A: Assess the team's knowledge of the technology and look for recommended training options.
whyBullets: A is correct: PM coach/phát triển năng lực thay vì thay thế hoặc đánh giá/punish — phát triển bền vững.
PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Option B (Contract with an expert provider to do the piece of work that uses that specific technology.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Assess the team's knowledge of the technology and look for recommended training options.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "thông báo một chiều (inform/notify)" không giải quyết Create an item in the risk log and notify the sponsor. — đáp án đúng cần coaching / phát triển năng lực.
excludeReasons.D: "Fix any training gaps as they arise during the project.…" cùng nhóm coaching / phát triển năng lực nhưng lệch trọng tâm — "Assess the team's knowledge of the technology and look for recommended t…" sát vấn đề trong đề bài hơn.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do next
A project manager is leading a high-visibility innovation project that has strong executive sponsorship and is under tight deadlines
A recent requirement change mandates the use of a new and emerging technology, which requires specialized expertise
During a status meeting, a current team member expresses interest in the new role and confirms they are certified and experienced in the technology
The team member’s current role is critical, but they are highly motivated and could be a strong fit for the new assignment
356.signalAnswer: Stem signals (trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule; vấn đề chất lượng / defect) support A: Reassign the team member to the task to support their growth at the organization, and acquire a resource to replace the team member's old ro
whyBullets: A is correct: Đánh giá skill gap/root cause trước khi thay thế — hiểu nguyên nhân trước khi hành động.
PMBOK 8: Manage Project Execution — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "yêu cầu team hành động (chưa rõ facilitation)" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần đánh giá cá nhân / skill gap.
excludeReasons.C: Leo thang quá sớm khi PM chưa thử các biện pháp trong phạm vi quyền hạn; chỉ escalate khi vượt quyền hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "coaching / phát triển năng lực" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần đánh giá cá nhân / skill gap.

signalPhrases: What should have been done differently
A senior stakeholder attended a sprint review and asked a team member to explain the final product that the project will deliver
The team member was unable to answer and redirected the question to a more senior colleague
357.signalAnswer: Stem signals (ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support B: The team member should have directed the stakeholder to speak with the product owner
whyBullets: B is correct: PM trao đổi trực tiếp để hiểu vấn đề và cùng tìm hướng xử lý — trước khi sửa baseline hay escalate.
PMBOK 8: Manage Stakeholder Engagement — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: "The team member should have directed the stakeholder to speak with the s…" cùng nhóm họp / thảo luận trực tiếp nhưng lệch trọng tâm — "The team member should have directed the stakeholder to speak with the p…" sát ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum hơn.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (The stakeholder should have held their questions until the next sprint review meeting.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (The team member should have directed the stakeholder to speak with the product owner) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "chỉ đạo cứng / ra lệnh" không giải quyết ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum — đáp án đúng cần họp / thảo luận trực tiếp.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do to ensure a clear and agreed-upon scope definition

During the requirements gathering phase for a complex project involving multiple diverse stakeholders, the project manager find that some stakeholders have competing priorities and expectations, while others are unclear about their own needs due to evolving organizational objectives
Early attempts to gather full input have revealed divergent views, and there is pressure to finalize the scope soon to meet aggressive deadlines
358.signalAnswer: Stem signals (trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule; mức độ uncertainty cao) support A: Facilitate a collaborative session to help stakeholders reach consensus on conflicting requirements.
whyBullets: A is correct: PM facilitate thảo luận để team/stakeholder cùng giải quyết — Build an empowered culture.
PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Option B (Follow the recommendation of the technical consultant to resolve the conflict.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Facilitate a collaborative session to help stakeholders reach consensus on conflicting requirem) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Leo thang quá sớm khi PM chưa thử các biện pháp trong phạm vi quyền hạn; chỉ escalate khi vượt quyền hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Conduct separate meetings with the disagreeing stakeholders to understand their perspectives.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Facilitate a collaborative session to help stakeholders reach consensus on conflicting requirem) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: An external regulatory stakeholder has significant authority over project approvals and has recently expressed concerns about the project's compliance approach
This stakeholder can approve or reject critical project phases, potentially causing major delays
The stakeholder has been difficult to reach and seems to prefer informal communication channels over formal project processes
What approach should the project manager take with this high-influence stakeholder
359.signalAnswer: Stem signals (stakeholder không hài lòng / kỳ vọng lệch; đạo đức / tuân thủ) support A: Adapt communication methods to match stakeholder preferences while ensuring compliance requirements.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Manage Stakeholder Engagement — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Leo thang quá sớm khi PM chưa thử các biện pháp trong phạm vi quyền hạn; chỉ escalate khi vượt quyền hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Schedule regular informal meetings to build rapport and proactively address concerns before the) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Adapt communication methods to match stakeholder preferences while ensuring compliance requirem) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Ghi nhận lessons learned / cập nhật log là quan trọng nhưng thường là bước sau khi đã xử lý tình huống — không phải hành động ưu tiên khi câu hỏi hỏi FIRST/NEXT. (Câu hỏi hỏi ACTION — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)

signalPhrases: What should the project manager have done to prevent this situation
A project manager in the execution phase of a project discovers several stakeholders identified at project initiation are no longer involved
These removed stakeholders are frustrated with unnecessary communication and express concern that the remaining stakeholders may not be receiving all of the information they require
360.signalAnswer: Stem signals (stakeholder không hài lòng / kỳ vọng lệch) support C: Updated the stakeholder engagement plan through the change control process.
whyBullets: C is correct: Stakeholder mới/thay đổi bối cảnh — PM phân tích stakeholder, xác định nhu cầu thông tin và cập nhật communications plan thay vì thêm ad hoc hay từ chối vì plan cũ chưa liệt kê (miền Stakeholders).
PMBOK 8: Manage Stakeholder Engagement — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Ghi nhận lessons learned / cập nhật log là quan trọng nhưng thường là bước sau khi đã xử lý tình huống — không phải hành động ưu tiên khi câu hỏi hỏi FIRST/NEXT. (Câu hỏi hỏi ACTION — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Reported all project information to every stakeholder throughout the project lifecycle.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Updated the stakeholder engagement plan through the change control process.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Từ chối stakeholder mới vì chưa có trong plan cũ — plan phải được cập nhật.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
The project is progressing, and the team is delivering successfully, but a key stakeholder calls the project manager and complains about not receiving progress updates
361.signalAnswer: Stem signals (stakeholder không hài lòng / kỳ vọng lệch) support B: Review and update the project communications management plan.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Ensure the stakeholder is copied on the weekly status emails.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Review and update the project communications management plan.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "thông báo / truyền đạt thông tin" không giải quyết stakeholder không hài lòng / kỳ vọng lệch — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Invite the key stakeholder to attend the next project meeting.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Review and update the project communications management plan.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What action should the project manager take to resolve this issue
resulting in excessive and unacceptable levels of rework. What action should the project manager take to resolve this issue?
the customer does not fully understand the importance of their ongoing involvement
362.signalAnswer: Stem signals (vấn đề chất lượng / defect) support C: Meet with the customer to emphasize the critical role their ongoing engagement plays in the success of the project.
whyBullets: C is correct: PM chủ động engagement stakeholder: làm rõ kỳ vọng, nhu cầu thông tin và thống nhất hướng xử lý.
PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "change control / change request" không giải quyết vấn đề chất lượng / defect — đáp án đúng cần engagement stakeholder / làm rõ kỳ vọng.
excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "ưu tiên theo giá trị / MVP" không giải quyết vấn đề chất lượng / defect — đáp án đúng cần engagement stakeholder / làm rõ kỳ vọng.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "khuyến khích collaboration / hợp tác" không giải quyết vấn đề chất lượng / defect — đáp án đúng cần engagement stakeholder / làm rõ kỳ vọng.

signalPhrases: A project manager communicates with a key stakeholder via phone calls only, as indicated in the communication management plan
Three weeks into the execution of a project, the project manager begins receiving an increasing amount of redundant ad hoc communication requests from that stakeholder
How should the project manager address this issue
363.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support B: Meet with the stakeholder to discuss their communication needs and expectations.
whyBullets: B is correct: PM chủ động engagement stakeholder: làm rõ kỳ vọng, nhu cầu thông tin và thống nhất hướng xử lý.
PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tiếp tục mà chưa align kỳ vọng stakeholder.
excludeReasons.C: Briefing/thông báo tiến độ không thay cho thảo luận scope/yêu cầu thay đổi.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Assign a team member to act as a liaison between the project manager and the stakeholder.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Meet with the stakeholder to discuss their communication needs and expectations.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: During the project's initial stages, the project manager identifies a highly influential stakeholder who is resistant to the project
This stakeholder's support is crucial for the project's success, but they have expressed concerns and reservations
How should the project manager handle this situation
364.signalAnswer: Stem signals (stakeholder không hài lòng / kỳ vọng lệch) support A: Develop a stakeholder engagement plan that includes strategies to address the concerns of the resistant stakeholder.
whyBullets: A is correct: PM chủ động engagement stakeholder: làm rõ kỳ vọng, nhu cầu thông tin và thống nhất hướng xử lý.
PMBOK 8: Manage Stakeholder Engagement — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Thay đổi phạm vi cần quy trình change control và thống nhất stakeholder — không phải phản ứng mặc định khi gặp trở ngại.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Assign the task of managing the resistant stakeholder to a team member and focus on engaging ot) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Develop a stakeholder engagement plan that includes strategies to address the concerns of the r) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Seek senior management's intervention to convince the resistant stakeholder of the project's im) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Develop a stakeholder engagement plan that includes strategies to address the concerns of the r) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager have defined and communicated at the start
A remote project team has members from two countries
Team members from one country expect days off for a national holiday, but the project manager asked them to work to meet a key iteration deliverable
The team is upset and does not understand why they must work during the holiday
365.signalAnswer: Internationally dispersed virtual team + PM concerned about engagement — recurring check-ins and scheduled meetings sustain connection (Develop Team), not copying a past comms plan or async-only status reports.
whyBullets: Signal: virtual team + engagement concern — PM needs cadence check-ins/meetings, not a one-time kickoff or async-only comms.
D is correct: recurring check-ins keep internationally dispersed team connected and aligned (Develop Team + Build an empowered culture).
PMBOK 8: Develop Team focuses on team interaction and environment — ongoing cadence beats one-off kickoff for sustained engagement.

excludeReasons.B: Copying a past team's communications plan ignores current context and team needs.
excludeReasons.C: Async-only status reports lack synchronous interaction needed for a new virtual team.
excludeReasons.D: Leo thang quá sớm khi PM chưa thử các biện pháp trong phạm vi quyền hạn; chỉ escalate khi vượt quyền hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên.

signalPhrases: The team has completed three sprints successfully, but a key external stakeholder now wants to reprioritize deliverables to demonstrate specific features to potential investors before the original planned release
This change would require significant backlog reordering and might impact team velocity and current sprint commitments
How should the project manager address this stakeholder request
366.signalAnswer: Stem signals (ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support A: Collaborate with the product owner and stakeholder to assess business value and integrate into sprint planning.
whyBullets: A is correct: PM khuyến khích collaboration / hợp tác để xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi — phù hợp miền Stakeholders + Scope, Focus Area Executing (PMBOK 8).
PMBOK 8: Manage Stakeholder Engagement — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "tham chiếu artifact / kế hoạch đã có" không giải quyết ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum — đáp án đúng cần khuyến khích collaboration / hợp tác.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "phối hợp với bên liên quan" không giải quyết ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum — đáp án đúng cần khuyến khích collaboration / hợp tác.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "ưu tiên theo giá trị / MVP" không giải quyết ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum — đáp án đúng cần khuyến khích collaboration / hợp tác.

signalPhrases: A project manager is leading a hybrid project with a self-organizing team
The team is unable to agree on the scope for the next increment
How should the project manager resolve this issue
367.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support A: Facilitate a team discussion to understand why the team is unable to agree on the scope for the next increment.
whyBullets: A is correct: PM facilitate thảo luận để team/stakeholder cùng giải quyết — Build an empowered culture.
PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Leo thang quá sớm khi PM chưa thử các biện pháp trong phạm vi quyền hạn; chỉ escalate khi vượt quyền hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "khuyến khích collaboration / hợp tác" không giải quyết Collaborate with a suitable subject matter expert (SME) to determine the scope for the next increment. — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.D: Consensus building ưu tiên thống nhất qua thảo luận, không phải đa số phiếu — đặc biệt với team đa dạng cần sự đồng thuận thực sự.

signalPhrases: Although regulatory compliance is well defined, the customer cannot finalize detailed requirements upfront
However, they urgently expect usable outcomes to be delivered early and regularly
Which delivery approach should the project manager recommend
368.signalAnswer: Stem signals (vấn đề chi phí / ngân sách; đạo đức / tuân thủ) support D: Use an incremental approach to deliver prioritized features early and incorporate feedback as the project evolves.
whyBullets: D is correct: PM ưu tiên theo business value/MVP — deliver giá trị sớm thay vì làm tất cả features cùng lúc.
PMBOK 8: Define Scope — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "đảm bảo tuân thủ / compliance" không giải quyết vấn đề chi phí / ngân sách — đáp án đúng cần ưu tiên theo giá trị / MVP.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Choose a hybrid model that allows detailed upfront planning while delivering quick results.) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Use an incremental approach to deliver prioritized features early and incorporate feedback as t) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Adopt a waterfall model to structure the entire scope in a linear and controlled manner.) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Use an incremental approach to deliver prioritized features early and incorporate feedback as t) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager have done to prevent this situation
A highway construction project is halfway complete when a local environmental group raises concerns that the project is damaging protected wetlands nearby
The group claims they were not properly informed about changes to the environmental impact assessments and are now organizing protests that delay construction activities
The project manager did not engage with the community early on nor regularly update them on changes
369.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support A: Implemented a stakeholder engagement plan with timely communication to affected communities.
whyBullets: A is correct: PM chủ động engagement stakeholder: làm rõ kỳ vọng, nhu cầu thông tin và thống nhất hướng xử lý.
PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "đảm bảo tuân thủ / compliance" không giải quyết Focused the team on meeting construction standards to prevent environmental issues. — đáp án đúng cần engagement stakeholder / làm rõ kỳ vọng.
excludeReasons.C: Leo thang quá sớm khi PM chưa thử các biện pháp trong phạm vi quyền hạn; chỉ escalate khi vượt quyền hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Restricted information sharing about project changes to avoid confusion among stakeholders.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Implemented a stakeholder engagement plan with timely communication to affected communities.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do first

During project implementation, a key stakeholder questions the project's business value and requests pausing work to evaluate a new market process that could significantly impact the final deliverable's relevance
The stakeholder has considerable influence and the team is concerned about project continuity
370.signalAnswer: Stem signals (stakeholder không hài lòng / kỳ vọng lệch) support A: Meet with the stakeholder to understand their concerns and assess the potential impact of the new process.
whyBullets: A is correct: Member/stakeholder cần được lắng nghe và hỗ trợ cụ thể trước — servant leadership, Build an empowered culture.
PMBOK 8: Manage Stakeholder Engagement — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "tham chiếu artifact / kế hoạch đã có" không giải quyết stakeholder không hài lòng / kỳ vọng lệch — đáp án đúng cần lắng nghe và hỗ trợ cá nhân.
excludeReasons.C: Ghi nhận lessons learned / cập nhật log là quan trọng nhưng thường là bước sau khi đã xử lý tình huống — không phải hành động ưu tiên khi câu hỏi hỏi FIRST/NEXT. (Câu hỏi hỏi FIRST — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "tham chiếu artifact / kế hoạch đã có" không giải quyết stakeholder không hài lòng / kỳ vọng lệch — đáp án đúng cần lắng nghe và hỗ trợ cá nhân.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do

In the early stages of team formation on a high-visibility project, the project manager is struggling to focus on strategic planning and stakeholder engagement because team members frequently request help to settle disputes over how to interpret the client’s requirements
These recurring conflicts are slowing progress and preventing the team from meeting early deliverable targets
371.signalAnswer: Stem signals (xung đột trong team hoặc stakeholder) support A: Encourage the team to resolve conflicts independently and build accountability.
whyBullets: A is correct: PM khuyến khích collaboration / hợp tác để xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi — phù hợp miền Stakeholders + Scope, Focus Area Executing (PMBOK 8).
PMBOK 8: Manage Stakeholder Engagement — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "phối hợp với bên liên quan" không giải quyết xung đột trong team hoặc stakeholder — đáp án đúng cần khuyến khích collaboration / hợp tác.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Engage the conflict resolution committee to facilitate agreement on requirements.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Encourage the team to resolve conflicts independently and build accountability.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Leo thang quá sớm khi PM chưa thử các biện pháp trong phạm vi quyền hạn; chỉ escalate khi vượt quyền hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do

excludeReasons.B: Option B (Produce a single detailed status report for everyone and expect stakeholders to extract what th) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Identify key stakeholder groups and tailor status artifacts in detail while keeping information) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Create separate, unrelated reports for each stakeholder group without ensuring they align.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Identify key stakeholder groups and tailor status artifacts in detail while keeping information) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Provide only executive summaries and ask teams to derive operational details themselves.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Identify key stakeholder groups and tailor status artifacts in detail while keeping information) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do

At a regional healthcare network, a project manager is planning a new telemedicine platform and has identified several high-impact risks such as regulatory delays, vendor cost increases, and extended training needs
The draft budget covers only planned work and does not reflect potential risk impacts
The sponsor asks how these risks are accounted for financially
The project manager sees the risk of budget overruns if contingencies are not addressed
419.signalAnswer: Stem signals (vấn đề chi phí / ngân sách; vấn đề vendor / procurement) support A: Quantify the financial impact of identified risks and incorporate appropriate contingency allocations into the budget.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Develop Schedule — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "change control / change request" không giải quyết vấn đề chi phí / ngân sách — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Ask team leads to absorb any risk-related overruns within their existing workstream budgets.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Quantify the financial impact of identified risks and incorporate appropriate contingency alloc) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Reduce planned scope to create an informal buffer instead of explicitly budgeting for risk.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Quantify the financial impact of identified risks and incorporate appropriate contingency alloc) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
The team debates whether to estimate all work the same way
The sponsor asks how estimates will remain realistic
420.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support A: Apply detailed estimating techniques to tasks and use more adaptive estimates for uncertain work.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Develop Schedule — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Option B (Use a single estimating technique for all tasks to simplify planning, regardless of uncertainty) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Apply detailed estimating techniques to tasks and use more adaptive estimates for uncertain wor) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Avoid estimating uncertain tasks until they become fully defined during execution.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Apply detailed estimating techniques to tasks and use more adaptive estimates for uncertain wor) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Inflate all estimates equally to cover uncertainty without distinguishing between task types.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Apply detailed estimating techniques to tasks and use more adaptive estimates for uncertain wor) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
Two technical alternatives have been identified, but it is unclear whether either will meet performance requirements

421.signalAnswer: Stem signals (mức độ uncertainty cao) support A: Ask the team to evaluate both alternatives through analysis or prototyping to determine feasibility.
whyBullets: A is correct: PM yêu cầu team hành động (chưa rõ facilitation) để xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi — phù hợp miền Stakeholders + Resources, Focus Area Executing (PMBOK 8).
PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Option B (Log the performance concern as an issue and assign it to a team member for monitoring.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Ask the team to evaluate both alternatives through analysis or prototyping to determine feasibi) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "tiếp tục theo kế hoạch hiện tại" không giải quyết mức độ uncertainty cao — đáp án đúng cần yêu cầu team hành động (chưa rõ facilitation).
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "chờ / trì hoãn" không giải quyết mức độ uncertainty cao — đáp án đúng cần yêu cầu team hành động (chưa rõ facilitation).

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
A vendor for a large and complex project has been performing more work than originally anticipated in the time and material contract

whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Manage Project Execution — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Create a request for quotation (RFQ) to formulate a list of new vendors.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Shift to a master services agreement with appendices for the additional work as required.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Ghi nhận lessons learned / cập nhật log là quan trọng nhưng thường là bước sau khi đã xử lý tình huống — không phải hành động ưu tiên khi câu hỏi hỏi FIRST/NEXT. (Câu hỏi hỏi ACTION — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "engagement stakeholder / làm rõ kỳ vọng" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.

excludeReasons.D: Option D (The project is behind schedule but under budget; the project manager should request additional) does not resolve the stem focus — A (The project is behind schedule and over budget; the project manager should analyze cost drivers) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

excludeReasons.C: Leo thang quá sớm khi PM chưa thử các biện pháp trong phạm vi quyền hạn; chỉ escalate khi vượt quyền hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên. (Câu hỏi hỏi ACTION — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)

excludeReasons.B: Option B (Ask each regional team to design its own coordination and decision-making practices without an) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Define a project execution strategy that specifies coordination mechanisms, decision authoritie) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

A project manager is unsure about the duration of a new product project and wants to account for variability using three-point estimating. Which method should they use to get the most statistically appropriate expected duration?

excludeReasons.B: Option B (Use a simple average of optimistic, most likely, and pessimistic estimates.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Use weighted three-point (PERT) estimating, weighting the most likely estimate four times.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Use bottom-up estimating by summing work package durations.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Use weighted three-point (PERT) estimating, weighting the most likely estimate four times.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do

excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "engagement stakeholder / làm rõ kỳ vọng" không giải quyết vấn đề vendor / procurement — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.

excludeReasons.D: Option D (Prepare a report for the next stakeholder meeting that outlines recommended project outcome imp) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Report the results transparently, explaining the variances and proposed corrective actions.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

excludeReasons.B: Leo thang quá sớm khi PM chưa thử các biện pháp trong phạm vi quyền hạn; chỉ escalate khi vượt quyền hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "tham chiếu artifact / kế hoạch đã có" không giải quyết vấn đề chất lượng / defect — đáp án đúng cần quản lý vendor / procurement.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do

excludeReasons.B: Copying a past team's communications plan ignores current context and team needs.
excludeReasons.C: Async-only status reports lack synchronous interaction needed for a new virtual team.

excludeReasons.B: Option B (Use sprint reviews and feedback from stakeholders to adjust expectations.) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Ask the team to estimate story points and monitor their velocity over time.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Review historical sprint data and observe team collaboration dynamics.) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Ask the team to estimate story points and monitor their velocity over time.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
A project delivered a prototype as specified in the scope statement

excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "xác nhận đã hoàn thành (không xử lý mới)" không giải quyết vấn đề chất lượng / defect — đáp án đúng cần đảm bảo chất lượng / kiểm soát quality.
excludeReasons.D: Ghi nhận lessons learned / cập nhật log là quan trọng nhưng thường là bước sau khi đã xử lý tình huống — không phải hành động ưu tiên khi câu hỏi hỏi FIRST/NEXT. (Câu hỏi hỏi ACTION — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do

601.signalAnswer: Stem signals (trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule; stakeholder không hài lòng / kỳ vọng lệch) support B: Assess the schedule impact and discuss recovery options with stakeholders and the vendor.

excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "engagement stakeholder / làm rõ kỳ vọng" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần quản lý vendor / procurement.
excludeReasons.D: "Review the approved vendor list to find a replacement and remove the pen…" cùng nhóm quản lý vendor / procurement nhưng lệch trọng tâm — "Assess the schedule impact and discuss recovery options with stakeholder…" sát trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule hơn.

excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "tham chiếu artifact / kế hoạch đã có" không giải quyết Tailor a requirements traceability matrix (RTM) to the project’s resources to track their progress. — đáp án đúng cần ghi nhận / tài liệu hóa.

signalPhrases: A project is at the stage of procurement negotiations, with agreements being worked out in preparation for signing a contract
A procurement team member who has the authority to sign contracts is leading the negotiations, but that team member needs support from the project manager

611.signalAnswer: Well-defined remaining scope signals fixed-price procurement — PM recommends firm-fixed-price to hold contractors accountable at agreed price, not flexible T&M, cost-plus, or a letter of intent before contract terms are set.
whyBullets: Signal: well-defined remaining scope — contract type should lock price for defined deliverables.
B đúng: firm-fixed-price holds contractors accountable for clearly defined scope at agreed price.

excludeReasons.C: Cost-plus reimburses incurred costs — buyer bears cost risk; wrong when scope and deliverables are clear.
excludeReasons.D: Letter of intent before final contract terms lets work start without firm agreement — poor procurement governance.

excludeReasons.A: "Direct the vendor to deliver the additional services with the intention …" cùng nhóm quản lý vendor / procurement nhưng lệch trọng tâm — "Facilitate an impact assessment and initiate formal contract modificatio…" sát vấn đề vendor / procurement hơn.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "họp / thảo luận trực tiếp" không giải quyết vấn đề vendor / procurement — đáp án đúng cần quản lý vendor / procurement.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "engagement stakeholder / làm rõ kỳ vọng" không giải quyết vấn đề vendor / procurement — đáp án đúng cần quản lý vendor / procurement.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do

Upon review, the project manager finds that there are no high-level quality standards documented for the project, and the team has been setting quality expectations informally on a deliverable-by-deliverable basis

whyBullets: D is correct: PM tra artifact/plan đã có (tài liệu dự án) để quyết định có căn cứ, không phản ứng tùy hứng.
PMBOK 8: Manage Stakeholder Engagement — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "đảm bảo chất lượng / kiểm soát quality" không giải quyết vấn đề chất lượng / defect — đáp án đúng cần tham chiếu artifact / kế hoạch đã có.
excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "đảm bảo tuân thủ / compliance" không giải quyết vấn đề chất lượng / defect — đáp án đúng cần tham chiếu artifact / kế hoạch đã có.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "đảm bảo tuân thủ / compliance" không giải quyết vấn đề chất lượng / defect — đáp án đúng cần tham chiếu artifact / kế hoạch đã có.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do first
During project execution, a customer requests to replace a planned piece of hardware with one that offers more features at a lower price
642.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support A: Evaluate the new features to ensure they align with the customer's business needs.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Manage Project Execution — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Option B (Incorporate the hardware immediately since it will reduce the overall project cost.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Evaluate the new features to ensure they align with the customer's business needs.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "họp / thảo luận trực tiếp" không giải quyết Meet with the team to plan the implementation of the new hardware as requested. — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "quản lý vendor / procurement" không giải quyết Request formal approval from the procurement manager and develop a prototype. — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do

excludeReasons.C: Option C (Expand the WBS dictionary to include detailed cost and schedule data.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Establish control accounts that integrate scope with budget and schedule.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Create planning packages for work that has not yet been fully defined.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Establish control accounts that integrate scope with budget and schedule.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do first

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Request that the product manager increase the project timeline.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Identify tasks that can be reassigned to other team members.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Extend the sprint to offset the loss of the core team member.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Identify tasks that can be reassigned to other team members.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "bổ sung nguồn lực / hire" không giải quyết rủi ro đã/sắp xảy ra — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
A project has the following characteristics: US$3 million budget, planned value (PV) of US$1.5 million, earned value (EV) of US$1.8 million, and actual cost (AC) of US$2 million

excludeReasons.C: Option C (Determine that the project is on schedule and on budget since earned value and actual cost are) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Interpret the earned value data to confirm the project is ahead of schedule and over budget.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Report that the project is behind schedule and over budget, requiring immediate corrective acti) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Interpret the earned value data to confirm the project is ahead of schedule and over budget.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do

excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "quản lý vendor / procurement" không giải quyết SME chưa buy-in Agile teamwork — đáp án đúng cần engagement stakeholder / làm rõ kỳ vọng.

excludeReasons.D: Option D (Implement Kano analysis and customer journey mapping to categorize requirements by satisfaction) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Conduct Pareto analysis to prioritize the highest-impact issues and use a MoSCoW diagram to cla) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project team do
A product team developing a new mobile banking feature struggled in their last sprint

648.signalAnswer: Stem signals (stakeholder không hài lòng / kỳ vọng lệch; team mới hình thành) support B: Hold regular product backlog refinement sessions to create small, clear, testable items that are ready for sprint planning.

excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "đảm bảo chất lượng / kiểm soát quality" không giải quyết stakeholder không hài lòng / kỳ vọng lệch — đáp án đúng cần Agile ceremony / iteration event.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "đảm bảo tuân thủ / compliance" không giải quyết stakeholder không hài lòng / kỳ vọng lệch — đáp án đúng cần Agile ceremony / iteration event.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Reduce sprint velocity targets so the team takes on fewer stories per sprint and has more time) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Work with the product owner to break down backlog stories further and update the definition of) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "facilitate retrospective / phân tích root cause" không giải quyết ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum — đáp án đúng cần phối hợp với bên liên quan.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "Agile ceremony / iteration event" không giải quyết ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum — đáp án đúng cần phối hợp với bên liên quan.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Deliver only essential product functions first, and then expand later updates with structured s) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Prioritize revisions for the high-demand product features and release them incrementally for ea) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Conduct structured customer focus groups before rollout to validate expectations, insights, and) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Prioritize revisions for the high-demand product features and release them incrementally for ea) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Identify the major dependencies among product features before deciding on the incremental deliv) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Prioritize revisions for the high-demand product features and release them incrementally for ea) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "change control / change request" không giải quyết Redefine the project scope with the project team and submit a formal change request through governance. — đáp án đúng cần engagement stakeholder / làm rõ kỳ vọng.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Demonstrate alignment of the proposed packaging with the company’s strategic objectives.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Engage stakeholders to identify and quantify measurable value components of the new packaging.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Conduct an earned value management (EVM) analysis and describe the results as tangible business) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Engage stakeholders to identify and quantify measurable value components of the new packaging.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do

excludeReasons.C: Ghi nhận lessons learned / cập nhật log là quan trọng nhưng thường là bước sau khi đã xử lý tình huống — không phải hành động ưu tiên khi câu hỏi hỏi FIRST/NEXT. (Câu hỏi hỏi ACTION — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Complete the current project scope as approved and propose the missing deliverables as a separa) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Verify with stakeholders whether the omissions were intentional, include the missing work in th) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Adopt a predictive approach to ensure a fully specified product is delivered on schedule and wi) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Recommend an agile approach to accelerate delivery of business value and reduce the risk of bui) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Conduct an extensive upfront market analysis to minimize the risk of building a product that do) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Recommend an agile approach to accelerate delivery of business value and reduce the risk of bui) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Use a phased delivery model with fixed scope and defined checkpoints to balance structure with) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Recommend an agile approach to accelerate delivery of business value and reduce the risk of bui) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do next

excludeReasons.C: Option C (Schedule a limited product release with unresolved defects, and plan fixes for later under warr) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Stop release until defects are rectified, ensuring compliance and meeting required quality stan) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Address all easily resolved defects and ensure that product shipments can be deployed on schedu) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Stop release until defects are rectified, ensuring compliance and meeting required quality stan) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

excludeReasons.A: "Decline the scope change request and advise the stakeholder that new fea…" cùng nhóm change control / change request nhưng lệch trọng tâm — "Analyze the scope management plan to determine how changes are handled a…" sát vấn đề trong đề bài hơn.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Accept the scope change informally and incorporate it into the next sprint to maintain a positi) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Analyze the scope management plan to determine how changes are handled and follow the correct c) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do to ensure compliance

excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "họp / thảo luận trực tiếp" không giải quyết vấn đề chất lượng / defect — đáp án đúng cần đảm bảo tuân thủ / compliance.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do

657.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support B: Develop a benefits management plan that outlines how intended benefits will be measured, tracked, and realized.

excludeReasons.C: Option C (Create a user story that describes the project’s vision and high-level objectives from the end) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Develop a benefits management plan that outlines how intended benefits will be measured, tracke) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Design a development value stream to understand the project’s complex workflows and interdepend) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Develop a benefits management plan that outlines how intended benefits will be measured, tracke) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
A project manager is assigned to lead a strategic initiative involving a virtual, multicultural team with members from five different countries
The team will work across multiple time zones, with varying access to communication tools and different cultural norms for meetings and decision-making
658.signalAnswer: Internationally dispersed virtual team + PM concerned about engagement — recurring check-ins and scheduled meetings sustain connection (Develop Team), not copying a past comms plan or async-only status reports.
whyBullets: Signal: virtual team + engagement concern — PM needs cadence check-ins/meetings, not a one-time kickoff or async-only comms.

excludeReasons.A: One kickoff meeting does not sustain ongoing engagement for a new virtual team.
excludeReasons.B: Copying a past team's communications plan ignores current context and team needs.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Select a single official project language to simplify communication across the team.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Account for time zones, tool availability, and potential constraints when planning the meeting.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do

excludeReasons.C: Option C (Average the three estimates equally to produce an unweighted duration estimate of 17.7 days for) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Apply the PERT weighted three-point formula to calculate an expected duration of 16 days for th) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Use the pessimistic estimate of 28 days to build in a sufficient schedule buffer for all identi) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Apply the PERT weighted three-point formula to calculate an expected duration of 16 days for th) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

A project manager is analyzing the features and relationships of all components of the project management plan to determine their potential risks

excludeReasons.A: Ghi nhận lessons learned / cập nhật log là quan trọng nhưng thường là bước sau khi đã xử lý tình huống — không phải hành động ưu tiên khi câu hỏi hỏi FIRST/NEXT. (Câu hỏi hỏi FIRST — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Perform a sensitivity analysis to determine which risks have the highest potential impact on th) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Perform a reserve analysis to evaluate the project’s risks and determine whether the reserve is) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Create a probability and impact matrix to visualize the likelihood and financial impact of each) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Perform a reserve analysis to evaluate the project’s risks and determine whether the reserve is) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
A major integration in a project with multiple dependencies is delayed by one month
The project sponsor insists that the project team work overtime to catch up

whyBullets: C is correct: PM thừa nhận lỗi và xin lỗi minh bạch — Lead accountably, giữ tin tưởng stakeholder.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
A project has three main tasks with the following relationships: Task A must finish before Task B can start, and Task B must finish before Task C is complete
662.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support C: Establish a finish-to-finish dependency between Task A and Task C to ensure both are completed at the same point in time.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Apply a start-to-start dependency between Task A and Task C to ensure they begin at the same ti) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Establish a finish-to-finish dependency between Task A and Task C to ensure both are completed) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Use a finish-to-start dependency between all three tasks and add a lag to Task C to align its c) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Establish a finish-to-finish dependency between Task A and Task C to ensure both are completed) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Apply a start-to-finish dependency between Task A and Task C so that Task C cannot finish until) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Establish a finish-to-finish dependency between Task A and Task C to ensure both are completed) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do

A project is being initiated as part of a larger business program. The project manager must identify the components of the project to ensure that it delivers value-based outcomes. What should the project manager do?
663.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support C: Collaborate with stakeholders to understand business objectives and define the project’s value components.

excludeReasons.B: Option B (Optimize the workflows of all project components to maximize value by avoiding waste.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Collaborate with stakeholders to understand business objectives and define the project’s value) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Establish measurable metrics, such as return on investment, to evaluate the project’s success.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Collaborate with stakeholders to understand business objectives and define the project’s value) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the product owner do

whyBullets: D is correct: Embed quality: kiểm soát/prevent defect sớm, không để quality fail ở cuối pipeline.
PMBOK 8: Identify Risks — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: "Determine whether the improvements are necessary by reviewing adherence …" cùng nhóm đảm bảo chất lượng / kiểm soát quality nhưng lệch trọng tâm — "Use inspections and statistical sampling to assess the defect and confir…" sát vấn đề chất lượng / defect hơn.
excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "bổ sung register và reevaluate" không giải quyết vấn đề chất lượng / defect — đáp án đúng cần đảm bảo chất lượng / kiểm soát quality.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "sửa kế hoạch / baseline / schedule" không giải quyết vấn đề chất lượng / defect — đáp án đúng cần đảm bảo chất lượng / kiểm soát quality.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
The project manager needs to make these artifacts easily accessible for the team and to encourage team members to refer to them frequently for guidance
726.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support C: Organize the documents on a central website that individual team members can access as often as needed.
whyBullets: C is correct: Ghi nhận/tài liệu hóa quyết định và kết quả — hỗ trợ traceability và lessons learned.
PMBOK 8: Plan Resources — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "thông báo / truyền đạt thông tin" không giải quyết Send reminder emails urging the team to review the project artifacts with instructions on where to find them. — đáp án đúng cần ghi nhận / tài liệu hóa.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Offer virtual collaboration tools to make it easier for team members to update policies and pro) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Organize the documents on a central website that individual team members can access as often as) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Hold workshops on how to use the policies and procedures so the team can become familiar with t) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Organize the documents on a central website that individual team members can access as often as) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: Because of the scope and impact of the project, closing off the entire development area during construction is not feasible
The project manager needs to accommodate the city and the public during the construction phase of the project
Which approach should the project manager implement
727.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support C: An incremental approach to adjust to the project environment and deliver the project value in phases.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Define Scope — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "trao quyền / để team tự quyết" không giải quyết An iterative approach to allow the team to adapt rapidly to changes in the project environment. — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (A hybrid approach to allow for modularized deliverables and iterations on the project design ph) does not resolve the stem focus — C (An incremental approach to adjust to the project environment and deliver the project value in p) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "đảm bảo tuân thủ / compliance" không giải quyết A predictive approach to stabilize the project plan, adhere to regulatory oversight, and deliver value on a tight schedule. — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
Before the product is shipped, the governing regulatory body issues new guidance for the certification of all radar devices, effective in the very near term
728.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support B: Submit a formal change request to integrate the new regulatory requirements into the approved project plan before delivery.
whyBullets: B is correct: Thay đổi scope/plan phải qua change control: đánh giá impact, approval — không tự ý implement.
PMBOK 8: Manage Project Execution — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "engagement stakeholder / làm rõ kỳ vọng" không giải quyết Review the contract with the customer and negotiate adjustments to scope, cost, and schedule to reflect the regulatory change. — đáp án đúng cần change control / change request.
excludeReasons.C: "Analyze the regulatory guidance with the compliance team, update the ris…" cùng nhóm change control / change request nhưng lệch trọng tâm — "Submit a formal change request to integrate the new regulatory requireme…" sát vấn đề trong đề bài hơn.
excludeReasons.D: Implements change mà không formal approval.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do next
Key stakeholders have determined that a complex project did not meet its objectives
729.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support A: Conduct a postmortem analysis and document the findings to inform and improve future projects.
whyBullets: A is correct: Ghi nhận/tài liệu hóa quyết định và kết quả — hỗ trợ traceability và lessons learned.
PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "facilitate retrospective / phân tích root cause" không giải quyết Execute a root cause analysis to assign responsibility for the failure and reallocate resources to similar projects. — đáp án đúng cần ghi nhận / tài liệu hóa.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "thông báo / truyền đạt thông tin" không giải quyết Survey stakeholders for their opinions on the project’s failure and share the findings with the team. — đáp án đúng cần ghi nhận / tài liệu hóa.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Ensure that the company’s next project is smaller and less complex, increasing the likelihood o) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Conduct a postmortem analysis and document the findings to inform and improve future projects.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do in this scenario
The project team has completed the scope statement, but during a planning workshop, functional managers argue for moving directly into scheduling
730.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support C: Develop a deliverable‑oriented WBS and support the WBS dictionary to ensure clarity and completion.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Define Scope — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Break down the project into the scheduled activities first and then derive the WBS from those t) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Develop a deliverable‑oriented WBS and support the WBS dictionary to ensure clarity and complet) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Organize the WBS by the individual team members rather than by the deliverables to simplify ass) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Develop a deliverable‑oriented WBS and support the WBS dictionary to ensure clarity and complet) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Use rolling wave planning to leave lower‑level WBS details and work packages until the next pha) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Develop a deliverable‑oriented WBS and support the WBS dictionary to ensure clarity and complet) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: On an agile project, a team member raises concerns about health and safety issues related to the project deliverable
How should the project manager handle health and safety issues on projects
731.signalAnswer: Stem signals (trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule; ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support D: Ensure that all health and safety requirements are included in the definition of done (DoD).
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Develop Team — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Ghi nhận lessons learned / cập nhật log là quan trọng nhưng thường là bước sau khi đã xử lý tình huống — không phải hành động ưu tiên khi câu hỏi hỏi FIRST/NEXT. (Câu hỏi hỏi ACTION — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Refer the team member to the health and safety department.) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Ensure that all health and safety requirements are included in the definition of done (DoD).) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "đảm bảo tuân thủ / compliance" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.

signalPhrases: The team has successfully progressed to the third iteration out of a planned total of six
During the upcoming iteration planning meeting, the customer notifies the team that a competitor intends to release a similar product to theirs in the next quarter, beating them to market

732.signalAnswer: Stem signals (ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support D: Collaborate with stakeholders to redefine MVP scope and adjust the release plan to launch earlier.
whyBullets: D is correct: Kick-off sản phẩm mới — define MVP trước để Focus on value, tránh commit toàn bộ roadmap quá sớm.
PMBOK 8: Manage Stakeholder Engagement — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "bổ sung nguồn lực / hire" không giải quyết ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum — đáp án đúng cần define MVP / minimum viable product.
excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "engagement stakeholder / làm rõ kỳ vọng" không giải quyết ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum — đáp án đúng cần define MVP / minimum viable product.
excludeReasons.C: Task board/visual board chung — chưa define MVP cho sản phẩm mới.

signalPhrases: A project manager is finishing a project in a complex environment where the initial scope, timeline, and resources have evolved over time
The sponsor is requesting insights on the realization of benefits and the overall value delivered by the project
The project manager also needs to consider any challenges faced during execution, such as budget deviations, changes in scope, and varying stakeholder expectations

733.signalAnswer: Stem signals (trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule) support A: Evaluate both qualitative and quantitative project benefits, considering their alignment with the project's strategic goals.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Estimate Costs — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Option B (Calculate the tangible benefits and divide them by the total project expenses to measure the pr) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Evaluate both qualitative and quantitative project benefits, considering their alignment with t) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "facilitate retrospective / phân tích root cause" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Compare the actual project outcomes with the initial budget to evaluate the project's financial) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Evaluate both qualitative and quantitative project benefits, considering their alignment with t) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
New technologies are being added to the backlog in response to evolving customer requirements
These changes will have a significant impact on the project’s deliverables, potentially affecting timelines, scope, and resource allocation
The project manager faces the challenge of balancing the new customer needs with the existing project constraints, including scope, budget, and available resources
734.signalAnswer: Stem signals (thiếu hụt nguồn lực / kỹ năng; ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support B: Manage customer expectations based on business needs, considering budget, timeline, and resource constraints.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Manage Stakeholder Engagement — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Replan the sprints and releases to meet customer expectations, adjusting timelines and resource) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Manage customer expectations based on business needs, considering budget, timeline, and resourc) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Accept the new requirements and plan a new release schedule without considering resource or tim) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Manage customer expectations based on business needs, considering budget, timeline, and resourc) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Push the project team to accept the new challenge, aiming to meet evolving customer expectation) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Manage customer expectations based on business needs, considering budget, timeline, and resourc) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager have done to avoid this
A large-scale, multi-year transformation project was completed according to the defined requirements and within the approved budget and schedule

735.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support D: Measured and demonstrated business value throughout the project lifecycle.
whyBullets: D is correct: PM ưu tiên theo business value/MVP — deliver giá trị sớm thay vì làm tất cả features cùng lúc.
PMBOK 8: Define Scope — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Ensured the requirements were properly captured in the product backlog.) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Measured and demonstrated business value throughout the project lifecycle.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Created a business strategy to assist with organizational change management.) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Measured and demonstrated business value throughout the project lifecycle.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Improved the status reporting processes to highlight specific project results.) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Measured and demonstrated business value throughout the project lifecycle.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do to ensure all team members submit their time sheets as required
The project manager is having difficulty getting the team to submit their time sheets
The feedback received from the team is that work will be delivered every two weeks, so no time sheets are required

excludeReasons.A: Yêu cầu team tự xử lý — PM vẫn chịu trách nhiệm facilitate; đáp án đúng: "Explain the impact of not submitting time sheets on the project's cost assessment.".
excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "thông báo / truyền đạt thông tin" không giải quyết Send a weekly reminder to each team member notifying them to submit their time sheets. — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Change the submission frequency for the time sheets from biweekly to weekly.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Explain the impact of not submitting time sheets on the project's cost assessment.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: At project initiation, a vendor provided a quote for the project's required services totaling US$100,000
As the project progressed, evolving requirements led to a revised statement of work and procurement process, resulting in a new vendor quote exceeding US$250,000

737.signalAnswer: Stem signals (vấn đề vendor / procurement) support D: Escalate the budget shortfall issue to the steering committee and request guidance or funding.
whyBullets: D is correct: Leo thang khi vấn đề vượt quyền PM hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên — sau khi đã thử xử lý trong phạm vi.
PMBOK 8: Manage Project Execution — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "quản lý vendor / procurement" không giải quyết vấn đề vendor / procurement — đáp án đúng cần leo thang lên cấp trên.
excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "quản lý vendor / procurement" không giải quyết vấn đề vendor / procurement — đáp án đúng cần leo thang lên cấp trên.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "quản lý vendor / procurement" không giải quyết vấn đề vendor / procurement — đáp án đúng cần leo thang lên cấp trên.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager have done to prevent this situation
A construction company is executing a strategic project with a fixed budget
During project monitoring, the project manager identifies unexpected cost increases caused by excess use of materials

738.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support B: Provided early training to team members on material handling procedures and cost reporting expectations.
whyBullets: B is correct: PM coach/phát triển năng lực thay vì thay thế hoặc đánh giá/punish — phát triển bền vững.
PMBOK 8: Estimate Costs — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Ghi nhận lessons learned / cập nhật log là quan trọng nhưng thường là bước sau khi đã xử lý tình huống — không phải hành động ưu tiên khi câu hỏi hỏi FIRST/NEXT. (Câu hỏi hỏi ACTION — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Included a contingency reserve in the cost baseline to account for fluctuations in material usa) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Provided early training to team members on material handling procedures and cost reporting expe) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Prevented the assignment of new team members to ongoing strategic projects with limited budgets) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Provided early training to team members on material handling procedures and cost reporting expe) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
A project manager is developing a project budget
After estimating the cost of each activity, the manager adds a contingency reserve by increasing the estimated cost of all activities by the same percentage
However, this resulted in the total cost exceeding the allocated budget even before adding the management reserve
739.signalAnswer: Stem signals (vấn đề chi phí / ngân sách) support C: Recalculate the contingency reserve based on identified risks and response strategies.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Estimate Costs — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Ask for additional budget to ensure that all cost estimations are appropriately funded.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Recalculate the contingency reserve based on identified risks and response strategies.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Reduce the percentage increase to reduce the total cost of the project.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Recalculate the contingency reserve based on identified risks and response strategies.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Allocate a portion of the contingency reserve to the management reserve.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Recalculate the contingency reserve based on identified risks and response strategies.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
During the latest retrospective, a team member mentioned that team velocity was higher when the team worked together in the project room

740.signalAnswer: Stem signals (trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule; team phân tán / virtual) support A: Gather team feedback and evaluate the impact of colocation on velocity.
whyBullets: A is correct: Trước khi đồng ý thay đổi, PM đánh giá impact lên scope/schedule/cost/risk — không quyết định mù quáng.
PMBOK 8: Perform Integrated Change Control — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Option B (Refine the product backlog to maintain current team flexibility and output.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Gather team feedback and evaluate the impact of colocation on velocity.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Propose to senior leaders that organizational remote work policies be revised.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Gather team feedback and evaluate the impact of colocation on velocity.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Update the team charter to require in-person collaboration during sprints.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Gather team feedback and evaluate the impact of colocation on velocity.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager emphasize to ensure a focus on managing quality improvements
A project manager is leading a project to deliver a new product in a heavily regulated industry and must prioritize quality management practices
The project manager is considering the management of quality improvements
741.signalAnswer: Stem signals (trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule; vấn đề chất lượng / defect) support D: Establish clear quality metrics and targets for each project stage to ensure compliance with regulatory quality standards.
whyBullets: D is correct: PM đảm bảo tuân thủ policy/regulation — Governance và Lead accountably.
PMBOK 8: Manage Project Execution — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "ưu tiên theo giá trị / MVP" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần đảm bảo tuân thủ / compliance.
excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "đảm bảo chất lượng / kiểm soát quality" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần đảm bảo tuân thủ / compliance.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "đảm bảo chất lượng / kiểm soát quality" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần đảm bảo tuân thủ / compliance.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
During discussions with the development team lead, the project manager is told that this is normal when trying to stay on schedule
The development team is pressing to move on so that a deadline is not missed, but the project manager is concerned
742.signalAnswer: Stem signals (trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule) support C: Examine the quality metrics to determine if the project is complying with the documented quality requirements.
whyBullets: C is correct: Ghi nhận/tài liệu hóa quyết định và kết quả — hỗ trợ traceability và lessons learned.
PMBOK 8: Define Scope — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Update the work breakdown structure (WBS) and extend the durations in the project schedule to a) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Examine the quality metrics to determine if the project is complying with the documented qualit) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "yêu cầu team hành động (chưa rõ facilitation)" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần ghi nhận / tài liệu hóa.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "change control / change request" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần ghi nhận / tài liệu hóa.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do first to address this situation
A new project manager has taken over an ongoing project that seems to be on track with budget and schedule, based on progress reports
A key supplier suddenly informs the project manager that they cannot deliver critical materials as scheduled due to manufacturing issues
743.signalAnswer: Stem signals (vấn đề vendor / procurement) support A: Conduct an impact analysis on schedule, budget, and quality to understand the full implications.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Identify Risks — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Leo thang quá sớm khi PM chưa thử các biện pháp trong phạm vi quyền hạn; chỉ escalate khi vượt quyền hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Immediately search for alternative suppliers to replace the critical materials and components.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Conduct an impact analysis on schedule, budget, and quality to understand the full implications) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "ghi nhận / cập nhật risk register" không giải quyết vấn đề vendor / procurement — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
The team planned 40 story points for each iteration and delivered 40, 10, 20, and 15 story points in the first four iterations
744.signalAnswer: Stem signals (ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support B: Work with team members to adjust the planned story points for the next iterations.
whyBullets: B is correct: PM sửa kế hoạch / baseline / schedule để xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi — phù hợp miền Scope + Stakeholders, Focus Area Executing (PMBOK 8).
PMBOK 8: Define Scope — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Reassign undelivered tasks to team members to complete during the next iteration.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Work with team members to adjust the planned story points for the next iterations.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Thay đổi phạm vi cần quy trình change control và thống nhất stakeholder — không phải phản ứng mặc định khi gặp trở ngại. (Câu hỏi hỏi FIRST — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "engagement stakeholder / làm rõ kỳ vọng" không giải quyết ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum — đáp án đúng cần sửa kế hoạch / baseline / schedule.

signalPhrases: A construction project is now 18 months into execution, but the schedule performance index (SPI) is only 0.68, indicating a significant delay
The project manager is committed to delivering the project on time, without increasing the budget or changing the scope

745.signalAnswer: Stem signals (trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule) support B: Fast-track the schedule by performing activities in parallel where possible.
whyBullets: B is correct: PM sửa kế hoạch / baseline / schedule để xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi — phù hợp miền Schedule + Scope, Focus Area Executing (PMBOK 8).
