excludeReasons.A: "Crash the schedule by increasing resources to speed up delayed activitie…" cùng nhóm sửa kế hoạch / baseline / schedule nhưng lệch trọng tâm — "Fast-track the schedule by performing activities in parallel where possi…" sát trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule hơn.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Reduce the project scope to shorten the timeline for the remaining work.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Fast-track the schedule by performing activities in parallel where possible.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "trao quyền / để team tự quyết" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần sửa kế hoạch / baseline / schedule.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
The project sponsor is confident that the project will be successful
However, key investors are less confident and require more information about the project before making an investment
746.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support A: Present detailed market analysis, business plan, and risk management strategies to investors.

excludeReasons.C: Option C (Submit a formal request for a budget increase based on the potential for increased costs.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Conduct a thorough risk assessment to identify potential financial risks and their impact.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Communicate frequently with the funding agency to stay informed about funding timelines and req) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Conduct a thorough risk assessment to identify potential financial risks and their impact.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do to ensure compliance
During a project review meeting, the project manager discovers that a supplier lacks the required updated certification
The procurement manager warns that the supplier is in violation of contract terms
In order to avoid delays, the project sponsor urges the supplier to continue work
768.signalAnswer: Stem signals (vấn đề vendor / procurement; đạo đức / tuân thủ) support C: Pause work until updated certification documentation is verified, thereby enforcing contract terms.
whyBullets: C is correct: Ghi nhận/tài liệu hóa quyết định và kết quả — hỗ trợ traceability và lessons learned.
PMBOK 8: Develop Team — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "quản lý vendor / procurement" không giải quyết vấn đề vendor / procurement — đáp án đúng cần ghi nhận / tài liệu hóa.
excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "quản lý vendor / procurement" không giải quyết vấn đề vendor / procurement — đáp án đúng cần ghi nhận / tài liệu hóa.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "quản lý vendor / procurement" không giải quyết vấn đề vendor / procurement — đáp án đúng cần ghi nhận / tài liệu hóa.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
The project sponsor is pressuring the project manager to adjust defect metrics before the next executive review
The quality assurance lead warns that doing this would undermine transparency
769.signalAnswer: Stem signals (trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule; vấn đề chất lượng / defect) support A: Report metrics transparently, explaining issues and corrective actions, to preserve trust and compliance.
whyBullets: A is correct: PM thừa nhận lỗi và xin lỗi minh bạch — Lead accountably, giữ tin tưởng stakeholder.
PMBOK 8: Manage Project Execution — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "ưu tiên theo giá trị / MVP" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần thừa nhận lỗi và giải trình minh bạch.
excludeReasons.C: "Delay reporting until project numbers improve, trading transparency for …" cùng nhóm thừa nhận lỗi và giải trình minh bạch nhưng lệch trọng tâm — "Report metrics transparently, explaining issues and corrective actions, …" sát trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule hơn.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "đảm bảo chất lượng / kiểm soát quality" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần thừa nhận lỗi và giải trình minh bạch.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do next
The quality assurance lead insists that the project must be updated to comply with the new standard
The sponsor warns that resulting cost and schedule impacts would be severe
The client refuses acceptance without regulatory compliance
770.signalAnswer: Stem signals (vấn đề chất lượng / defect; đạo đức / tuân thủ) support D: Process the requirement through change control with impact analysis for cost, schedule, and compliance.
whyBullets: D is correct: Thay đổi scope/plan phải qua change control: đánh giá impact, approval — không tự ý implement.
PMBOK 8: Define Scope — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Automate the compliance process to reduce human error and increase efficiency in compliance man) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Process the requirement through change control with impact analysis for cost, schedule, and com) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "coaching / phát triển năng lực" không giải quyết vấn đề chất lượng / defect — đáp án đúng cần change control / change request.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "đảm bảo tuân thủ / compliance" không giải quyết vấn đề chất lượng / defect — đáp án đúng cần change control / change request.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
The project sponsor meets with the client to showcase a prototype
During the demonstration, the project sponsor promises to deliver two months earlier than the baseline
Upon being informed of this promise, the engineering team advises this commitment is unrealistic
The project management office stresses that formal governance must approve any change in schedule
771.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support D: Explain to the sponsor and client that acceleration requires an impact analysis and change request approval.
whyBullets: D is correct: Thay đổi scope/plan phải qua change control: đánh giá impact, approval — không tự ý implement.
PMBOK 8: Manage Project Execution — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "phối hợp với bên liên quan" không giải quyết Commit to the sponsor’s promise and work with the engineering team to compress the schedule. — đáp án đúng cần change control / change request.
excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "bổ sung nguồn lực / hire" không giải quyết Request additional budget to hire additional qualified resources and pay the worker's overtime. — đáp án đúng cần change control / change request.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "họp / thảo luận trực tiếp" không giải quyết Meet with the client to address the unrealistic nature of compressing the timeline to two months. — đáp án đúng cần change control / change request.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
The burnup chart shows backlog growth outpacing delivery for several iterations
The sponsor insists that status reporting should remain green because the company executives prefer positive updates
772.signalAnswer: Stem signals (ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support B: Report yellow status, explain the backlog growth, and present corrective backlog refinement actions.
whyBullets: B is correct: Burnup cho thấy scope/backlog growth vượt delivery — báo cáo xanh sẽ misleading. PM phải Lead accountably: yellow status, giải thích trend, đề xuất corrective backlog refinement.
PMBOK 8: Manage Stakeholder Engagement — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "ghi nhận / cập nhật risk register" không giải quyết ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum — đáp án đúng cần Agile ceremony / iteration event.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Maintain green status and commit to adjustments after the project team has a chance to catch up) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Report yellow status, explain the backlog growth, and present corrective backlog refinement act) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Maintain green status because the planned solution includes dozens of new resources dedicated t) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Report yellow status, explain the backlog growth, and present corrective backlog refinement act) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
During an audit, reviewers discover inconsistent reporting of working hours across different teams
The sponsor suggests that the project manager minimize the reviewers' findings so executives remain confident
773.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support C: Correct the inconsistencies, reconcile all reported hours, and update status reports for stakeholders.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Manage Stakeholder Engagement — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Downplay inconsistencies, citing a misunderstanding of reporting requirements.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Correct the inconsistencies, reconcile all reported hours, and update status reports for stakeh) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "thay đổi phạm vi" không giải quyết Remove detailed hour tracking from the status report and replace it with a summary of completed tasks. — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Get a second expert opinion to go over the reporting inconsistencies.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Correct the inconsistencies, reconcile all reported hours, and update status reports for stakeh) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
During a cross-functional team meeting, key stakeholders request that the project manager show a single overall status metric
The sponsor suggests that the project manager present only velocity, but the finance manager stresses that both sets of data must be disclosed to meet requirements
774.signalAnswer: Stem signals (trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule; ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support D: Include both metrics in the report and explain the differences, risks, and corrective actions.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Estimate Costs — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "đảm bảo tuân thủ / compliance" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Prepare an integrated report that highlights only the positive values from both sets of data.) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Include both metrics in the report and explain the differences, risks, and corrective actions.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Focus on next steps to give stakeholders a clear understanding of the project's future directio) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Include both metrics in the report and explain the differences, risks, and corrective actions.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
Two critical milestones were delayed by four weeks
The sponsor insists the overall project status should remain green until after the major executive demonstration scheduled for ten days
775.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support A: Report yellow status, explain schedule variances, and present corrective recovery measures.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Develop Team — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Option B (Report red status and suspend project activities until a revised baseline is formally approved.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Report yellow status, explain schedule variances, and present corrective recovery measures.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "chờ / trì hoãn" không giải quyết Maintain a green status to satisfy the sponsor and disclose the delays after the executive demonstration. — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "facilitate retrospective / phân tích root cause" không giải quyết Address the delay with the team in the upcoming sprint retrospective meeting to identify the cause. — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do next
The launch date has been fixed and widely communicated across the organization and stakeholders
However, the project team is uncertain whether there is sufficient time to complete all planned product features before the deadline
The project manager must ensure that the most critical functionalities are delivered on time without compromising quality
776.signalAnswer: Stem signals (trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule; vấn đề chất lượng / defect) support B: Collaborate with the project team to estimate the minimum viable product (MVP) features.
whyBullets: B is correct: Kick-off sản phẩm mới — define MVP trước để Focus on value, tránh commit toàn bộ roadmap quá sớm.
PMBOK 8: Define Scope — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "bổ sung nguồn lực / hire" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần define MVP / minimum viable product.
excludeReasons.C: Ghi nhận lessons learned / cập nhật log là quan trọng nhưng thường là bước sau khi đã xử lý tình huống — không phải hành động ưu tiên khi câu hỏi hỏi FIRST/NEXT. (Câu hỏi hỏi NEXT — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)
excludeReasons.D: Leo thang quá sớm khi PM chưa thử các biện pháp trong phạm vi quyền hạn; chỉ escalate khi vượt quyền hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên.

signalPhrases: In an innovative project, the sponsor aims to develop a comprehensive and advanced data processing platform to better serve its customers
However, the platform's functionality cannot be clearly described in the project's requirements
What kind of project approach should the project manager recommend
777.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support C: C
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Predictive) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Agile) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Waterfall) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Agile) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Hybrid) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Agile) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: Halfway through a year-long project, a hardware supplier sends a project manager notice of an intent to increase prices due to fluctuating rates of exchange
Which document should the project manager reference
778.signalAnswer: Stem signals (vấn đề vendor / procurement) support B: Procurement management plan
whyBullets: B is correct: Quản lý vendor theo hợp đồng/procurement process — không bypass quy trình mua sắm.
PMBOK 8: Manage Project Execution — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "ghi nhận / cập nhật risk register" không giải quyết vấn đề vendor / procurement — đáp án đúng cần quản lý vendor / procurement.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "tham chiếu artifact / kế hoạch đã có" không giải quyết vấn đề vendor / procurement — đáp án đúng cần quản lý vendor / procurement.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Communication strategy) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Procurement management plan) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: At the beginning of a project, the project manager meets with the product owner and the business analyst to work on a requirements-gathering process, creating a list of requirements, features, and the product backlog
Which elements should be considered to ensure all user stories are well-written and sized correctly to allow for smooth agile project delivery
779.signalAnswer: Stem signals (ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support A: Independent, negotiable, and estimable
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Define Scope — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Option B (Unique, applicable, and replicable) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Independent, negotiable, and estimable) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Subdivisible, suitable, and considerable) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Independent, negotiable, and estimable) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Concise, detailed, and executable) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Independent, negotiable, and estimable) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: A project manager has completed the project deliverable that has met all the acceptance criteria. Which statement confirms that project benefits have been achieved?
780.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support A: The deliverable has been approved and the value has been confirmed.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Define Scope — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Option B (The deliverable solved all of the issues specified by the project sponsors.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (The deliverable has been approved and the value has been confirmed.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (The project has seen some improvements in the ability to make decisions.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (The deliverable has been approved and the value has been confirmed.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (The project was completed on schedule, without any complaints from end users.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (The deliverable has been approved and the value has been confirmed.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do first to systematically address these quality problems
A complex software integration project is experiencing cascading quality issues affecting multiple system components, resulting in customer complaints and potential contract penalties
The project team is overwhelmed by simultaneous defects across different modules, and stakeholders are demanding immediate resolution
The issues appear interconnected, involving technical debt, resource constraints, and process gaps
781.signalAnswer: Stem signals (thành viên quá tải hoặc bất mãn; vấn đề chất lượng / defect) support B: Perform a root-cause analysis using structured problem-solving methodologies and collaboration.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Develop Team — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "ưu tiên theo giá trị / MVP" không giải quyết thành viên quá tải hoặc bất mãn — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.C: Ghi nhận lessons learned / cập nhật log là quan trọng nhưng thường là bước sau khi đã xử lý tình huống — không phải hành động ưu tiên khi câu hỏi hỏi FIRST/NEXT. (Câu hỏi hỏi FIRST — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Implement trend analysis to identify patterns and focus on contract penalties.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Perform a root-cause analysis using structured problem-solving methodologies and collaboration.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do first to address this situation
Critical project equipment from an overseas vendor fails quality surveys, showing noncompliance with key specifications that could impact project deliverables
The vendor claims specifications were unclear and requests additional costs for remediation
Contract terms include penalty clauses, but enforcement could strain the vendor relationship needed for future phases
782.signalAnswer: Stem signals (vấn đề chất lượng / defect; vấn đề vendor / procurement) support A: Conduct a comprehensive impact analysis of noncompliance with project objectives and quality standards.
whyBullets: A is correct: PM đảm bảo tuân thủ policy/regulation — Governance và Lead accountably.
PMBOK 8: Manage Project Execution — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "quản lý vendor / procurement" không giải quyết vấn đề chất lượng / defect — đáp án đúng cần đảm bảo tuân thủ / compliance.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Engage legal counsel to assess contract enforcement options and potential penalty applications.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Conduct a comprehensive impact analysis of noncompliance with project objectives and quality st) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "quản lý vendor / procurement" không giải quyết vấn đề chất lượng / defect — đáp án đúng cần đảm bảo tuân thủ / compliance.

signalPhrases: A scheduled-for-release product is failing acceptance testing due to misalignment with end-user requirements that evolved during development
The original requirements were documented six months ago, but end users now report that their needs have changed due to market conditions and regulatory updates
The development team followed the documented requirements exactly, but stakeholders claim the product won’t deliver the expected business value in the current environment
How should the project manager prevent this misalignment in future projects
783.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support A: Implement continuous user feedback loops throughout development with regular validation.
whyBullets: A is correct: Embed quality: kiểm soát/prevent defect sớm, không để quality fail ở cuối pipeline.
PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "change control / change request" không giải quyết Establish formal change control processes for requirements with stakeholder approval workflows. — đáp án đúng cần đảm bảo chất lượng / kiểm soát quality.
excludeReasons.C: Ghi nhận lessons learned / cập nhật log là quan trọng nhưng thường là bước sau khi đã xử lý tình huống — không phải hành động ưu tiên khi câu hỏi hỏi FIRST/NEXT. (Câu hỏi hỏi ACTION — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Schedule regular stakeholder reviews at predetermined milestones to validate progress.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Implement continuous user feedback loops throughout development with regular validation.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
During a final inspection of a new product, the project team discovers a significant defect in one of the key deliverables
This defect poses a security risk to the client, who expects to start using the deliverable in two weeks
784.signalAnswer: Stem signals (vấn đề chất lượng / defect) support A: Conduct a quality investigation and initiate corrective action.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Estimate Costs — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "đảm bảo chất lượng / kiểm soát quality" không giải quyết vấn đề chất lượng / defect — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "họp / thảo luận trực tiếp" không giải quyết vấn đề chất lượng / defect — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "thừa nhận lỗi và giải trình minh bạch" không giải quyết vấn đề chất lượng / defect — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.

signalPhrases: During a stakeholder review session, a key stakeholder reports that a critical component of the product is “not user-friendly” and may negatively affect adoption by end users
The stakeholder insists that this issue must be addressed before the next release, but making changes now could impact schedule and budget baselines
How should the project manager address the concern
785.signalAnswer: Stem signals (stakeholder không hài lòng / kỳ vọng lệch) support B: Collaborate with the stakeholder to clarify the issue, verify a solution, and update acceptance criteria if necessary.
whyBullets: B is correct: PM làm việc trực tiếp với người liên quan để phát triển giải pháp, không chỉ thông báo một chiều.
PMBOK 8: Develop Team — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "đảm bảo tuân thủ / compliance" không giải quyết stakeholder không hài lòng / kỳ vọng lệch — đáp án đúng cần cùng phát triển giải pháp / collaborate.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Bring in a user experience (UX) specialist to assess usability issues and recommend practical s) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Collaborate with the stakeholder to clarify the issue, verify a solution, and update acceptance) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "change control / change request" không giải quyết stakeholder không hài lòng / kỳ vọng lệch — đáp án đúng cần cùng phát triển giải pháp / collaborate.

signalPhrases: The project manager has noticed that team members have valuable ideas on how to improve productivity

A company is transitioning from a predictive to an agile project management approach. The project manager has noticed that team members have valuable ideas on how to improve productivity. How can the project manager leverage these ideas?
786.signalAnswer: Stem signals (ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support A: Utilize project retrospective sessions for discussions and learning.
whyBullets: A is correct: Vấn đề lặp lại/quality — retrospective phân tích root cause và cải tiến hệ thống, không blame cá nhân.
PMBOK 8: Plan Resources — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "Agile ceremony / iteration event" không giải quyết ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum — đáp án đúng cần facilitate retrospective / phân tích root cause.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "coaching / phát triển năng lực" không giải quyết ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum — đáp án đúng cần facilitate retrospective / phân tích root cause.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "sửa kế hoạch / baseline / schedule" không giải quyết ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum — đáp án đúng cần facilitate retrospective / phân tích root cause.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do to ensure a smooth transition between approaches
A product development project encountered design issues
To address them, the team decided to change from a predictive to an iterative approach during the product design phase
787.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support A: Schedule a team workshop to plan the upcoming iterations.
whyBullets: A is correct: PM facilitate thảo luận để team/stakeholder cùng giải quyết — Build an empowered culture.
PMBOK 8: Manage Project Execution — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Option B (Help the team establish a repository for product artifacts.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Schedule a team workshop to plan the upcoming iterations.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "họp / thảo luận trực tiếp" không giải quyết Meet with the product manager to analyze upcoming user stories. — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Assist the design manager in determining the number of iterations.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Schedule a team workshop to plan the upcoming iterations.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do first
Midway through a fixed-price project, the customer formally rejects an interim deliverable during a review meeting, stating that it does not meet expectations
The contract includes detailed acceptance criteria, and milestone payments are tied to each approved deliverable
Several downstream tasks cannot start until this issue is resolved
The customer has requested that the deliverable be reworked immediately to avoid delays
788.signalAnswer: Stem signals (vấn đề chất lượng / defect) support A: Review the reason for rejection, verify the deliverable against the acceptance criteria, and determine if the rejection is valid.
whyBullets: A is correct: Embed quality: kiểm soát/prevent defect sớm, không để quality fail ở cuối pipeline.
PMBOK 8: Develop Team — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "chờ / trì hoãn" không giải quyết vấn đề chất lượng / defect — đáp án đúng cần đảm bảo chất lượng / kiểm soát quality.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Conduct a joint review session with the customer to agree on the specific changes needed for th) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Review the reason for rejection, verify the deliverable against the acceptance criteria, and de) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

complex project. Some goals have already been delivered by the previous project manager. While reviewing the project management plan

The project manager is preparing the monthly report for the steering committee What should the project manager recommend
809.signalAnswer: Stem signals (ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support C: Complete the sprint review and release the MVP with the completed features.
whyBullets: C is correct: Kick-off sản phẩm mới — define MVP trước để Focus on value, tránh commit toàn bộ roadmap quá sớm.
PMBOK 8: Manage Stakeholder Engagement — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: "Reschedule the MVP release review until all the agreed-on features have …" cùng nhóm define MVP / minimum viable product nhưng lệch trọng tâm — "Complete the sprint review and release the MVP with the completed featur…" sát ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum hơn.
excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "sửa kế hoạch / baseline / schedule" không giải quyết ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum — đáp án đúng cần define MVP / minimum viable product.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "change control / change request" không giải quyết ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum — đáp án đúng cần define MVP / minimum viable product.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager have done to avoid this situation
the CEO asked whether the project was still on track to meet its business case goal and achieve a 40% increase in production. The project manager responded that
they did not know the current status of the project. What should the project manager have done to avoid this situation?
A project manager has just taken over a 5-year project that is at the midpoint. At the steering committee meeting
810.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support C: Met with the project sponsor to review business case alignment and the status of deliverables.
whyBullets: C is correct: PM tra artifact/plan đã có (tài liệu dự án) để quyết định có căn cứ, không phản ứng tùy hứng.
PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Ghi nhận lessons learned / cập nhật log là quan trọng nhưng thường là bước sau khi đã xử lý tình huống — không phải hành động ưu tiên khi câu hỏi hỏi FIRST/NEXT. (Câu hỏi hỏi ACTION — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Conducted stakeholder interviews with key team members to validate current progress.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Met with the project sponsor to review business case alignment and the status of deliverables.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Analyzed project schedules and deliverables to assess progress against original baselines.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Met with the project sponsor to review business case alignment and the status of deliverables.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: When should the project be considered a success

A project is delivering incremental business value to a customer. The success criteria for the project is a 20% increase in market share for the customer. When should the project be considered a success?
811.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support C: After project execution, as part of the project closure report approval process.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (When sprint reviews demonstrate that each iteration delivers a 20% increase in market share.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (After project execution, as part of the project closure report approval process.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "ghi nhận / tài liệu hóa" không giải quyết After the project documentation is completed and the project team is assigned to other projects. — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (When the project is 75% complete, the earned value management (EVM) diagram shows that the proj) does not resolve the stem focus — C (After project execution, as part of the project closure report approval process.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: After deployment, adoption across the organization remains below 50%, primarily due to misalignment with existing core processes
Which three actions should the project manager have taken earlier to better ensure project benefits were realized
812.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support A: Conducted a needs assessment during the design phase to align the solution with actual business requirements.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.D: Option D (Requested the marketing team to gather customer feedback about the solution post-launch.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Conducted a needs assessment during the design phase to align the solution with actual business) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.E: Tập trung "coaching / phát triển năng lực" không giải quyết Developed a change management plan including communication and training components. — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do to ensure the project remains aligned with business objectives
In an agile project nearing completion, the team reports 95% progress toward the overall scope
However, during a recent iteration review, stakeholders expressed concerns that the delivered work was not meeting expected business value
813.signalAnswer: Stem signals (stakeholder không hài lòng / kỳ vọng lệch; ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support C: Work with the product owner to reassess the backlog, prioritize business value, and adjust scope or deliverables as needed.
whyBullets: C is correct: PM ưu tiên theo business value/MVP — deliver giá trị sớm thay vì làm tất cả features cùng lúc.
PMBOK 8: Develop Team — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "lắng nghe và hỗ trợ cá nhân" không giải quyết stakeholder không hài lòng / kỳ vọng lệch — đáp án đúng cần ưu tiên theo giá trị / MVP.
excludeReasons.B: Yêu cầu team tự xử lý — PM vẫn chịu trách nhiệm facilitate; đáp án đúng: ưu tiên theo giá trị / MVP.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Instruct the business analyst to redefine the project objectives based on the new stakeholder f) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Work with the product owner to reassess the backlog, prioritize business value, and adjust scop) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager evaluate
After months of coordinated effort, a high-priority project has delivered all contracted outputs
The sponsor now wants to confirm whether the outcomes truly support the strategic objectives defined at the start
The project manager must determine the most relevant factor to assess before closing the project
814.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support A: Compare delivered outcomes with the sponsor’s defined expectations for benefits and strategic value.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Manage Project Execution — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "tham chiếu artifact / kế hoạch đã có" không giải quyết Evaluate if project outputs are positioned to generate the maximum return within the business case. — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Review whether performance results stayed within tolerances agreed in the benefits management p) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Compare delivered outcomes with the sponsor’s defined expectations for benefits and strategic v) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "xác nhận đã hoàn thành (không xử lý mới)" không giải quyết Confirm adherence to approved scope, schedule, and cost baselines as defined in project governance. — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do

The project manager and team are concerned that, at this stage, sufficient data may not be available to fully validate the benefits, and premature publication could misrepresent the project’s actual value
815.signalAnswer: Stem signals (stakeholder không hài lòng / kỳ vọng lệch) support B: Explain that creating a business case now might result in incomplete or misleading benefit information.
whyBullets: B is correct: PM tra artifact/plan đã có (tài liệu dự án) để quyết định có căn cứ, không phản ứng tùy hứng.
PMBOK 8: Manage Stakeholder Engagement — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: "Collaborate with the customer to draft a preliminary business case, incl…" cùng nhóm tham chiếu artifact / kế hoạch đã có nhưng lệch trọng tâm — "Explain that creating a business case now might result in incomplete or …" sát stakeholder không hài lòng / kỳ vọng lệch hơn.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "thông báo / truyền đạt thông tin" không giải quyết stakeholder không hài lòng / kỳ vọng lệch — đáp án đúng cần tham chiếu artifact / kế hoạch đã có.
excludeReasons.D: "Inform the customer that preparing a business case now would require eff…" cùng nhóm tham chiếu artifact / kế hoạch đã có nhưng lệch trọng tâm — "Explain that creating a business case now might result in incomplete or …" sát stakeholder không hài lòng / kỳ vọng lệch hơn.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
A project manager is leading an internal PMO improvement project that was originally sponsored by a PMO leader supportive of the initiative
Midway through execution, the sponsor is replaced, and the new leader expresses skepticism about the project’s value and alignment with current priorities
816.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support C: Share the tracked benefits and projected outcomes to illustrate the project’s value and relevance.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "set expectations / thống nhất kỳ vọng và yêu cầu" không giải quyết Hold a targeted alignment meeting with the new PMO leader and team to clarify expectations and priorities. — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Present historical performance data to demonstrate past effectiveness and secure renewed sponso) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Share the tracked benefits and projected outcomes to illustrate the project’s value and relevan) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "tiếp tục theo kế hoạch hiện tại" không giải quyết Proceed with the existing plan on the basis of prior approval and avoid disruptions to the current schedule. — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
During a project planning session for a complex product, the project manager is defining a release plan to ensure continuous value delivery and maintain customer engagement
A senior stakeholder proposes delaying all releases until project completion so the customer can experience all features at once
817.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support D: Deliver the product over several short iterations to gather customer feedback and refine features during development.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "khuyến khích collaboration / hợp tác" không giải quyết Collaborate with the team to design a release schedule balancing complexity and early delivery of features. — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "set expectations / thống nhất kỳ vọng và yêu cầu" không giải quyết Recommend phased releases at major milestones to provide visibility, manage expectations, and reduce risks. — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "đảm bảo chất lượng / kiểm soát quality" không giải quyết Plan targeted releases for completed features so testing and stakeholder feedback can be incorporated early. — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.

signalPhrases: A project manager is leading a critical construction project in its fifth month when performance metrics reveal concerning trends
The schedule performance index (SPI) is 0.8, and the cost performance index (CPI) is 0.9, indicating both schedule delays and cost overruns
The client is demanding schedule recovery without additional budget allocation, and penalties for late delivery are significant
818.signalAnswer: Stem signals (trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule; vấn đề chi phí / ngân sách) support A: Optimize working procedures to streamline processes and improve efficiency with current resources.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Develop Schedule — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Option B (Modify the critical path by replacing critical activities with activities that have available f) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Optimize working procedures to streamline processes and improve efficiency with current resourc) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Increase resource allocation to accelerate activities and reduce overall project duration.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Optimize working procedures to streamline processes and improve efficiency with current resourc) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.E: Option E (Implement mandatory overtime schedules for the team to help accelerate progress and recover los) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Optimize working procedures to streamline processes and improve efficiency with current resourc) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
An agile project team has not completed critical tasks within the current iteration, marking the third consecutive sprint with incomplete deliverables

During a stakeholder meeting, the project sponsor mandates a final completion date to meet regulatory compliance requirements, stating that missing this deadline could result in significant financial penalties and potential license suspension
The team maintains that they need more time for quality assurance, while the product owner supports the sponsor's concerns about the timeline
819.signalAnswer: Stem signals (trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule; vấn đề chi phí / ngân sách) support C: Work with the product owner to reprioritize the backlog and identify the minimum viable deliverables that fulfill compliance requirements.
whyBullets: C is correct: PM ưu tiên theo business value/MVP — deliver giá trị sớm thay vì làm tất cả features cùng lúc.
PMBOK 8: Develop Team — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "engagement stakeholder / làm rõ kỳ vọng" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần ưu tiên theo giá trị / MVP.
excludeReasons.B: Leo thang quá sớm khi PM chưa thử các biện pháp trong phạm vi quyền hạn; chỉ escalate khi vượt quyền hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Implement additional oversight and daily check-ins to help the team meet the sponsor's deadline) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Work with the product owner to reprioritize the backlog and identify the minimum viable deliver) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager prioritize first
Project team members inform the project manager of a technical challenge that could impact current sprint deliverables and potentially affect the upcoming milestone deadline
The challenge involves integration issues with a third-party system that was expected to be straightforward
Initial estimates suggest a delay of 2–3 weeks, but the team is uncertain about the full scope of the required changes
Stakeholders are expecting a status update within 24 hours
820.signalAnswer: Stem signals (trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule; ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support A: Conduct detailed impact analysis with the team to quantify timeline and scope implications.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Develop Team — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "thông báo / truyền đạt thông tin" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.C: Ghi nhận lessons learned / cập nhật log là quan trọng nhưng thường là bước sau khi đã xử lý tình huống — không phải hành động ưu tiên khi câu hỏi hỏi FIRST/NEXT. (Câu hỏi hỏi FIRST — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "quản lý vendor / procurement" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do first
A technical lead suggests a new implementation approach one day before beginning a critical task
The approach could accelerate delivery by one week but carries a 40% risk of causing a three-day delay
The team is confident in their current approach, and stakeholders are expecting delivery according to the original timeline
The project has limited schedule reserves, and any delays could impact the final deliverable
821.signalAnswer: Stem signals (trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule) support C: Assess the task's schedule float and analyze the risk impact on the critical path.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Manage Stakeholder Engagement — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Reject the suggestion to maintain timeline certainty and stakeholder expectations.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Assess the task's schedule float and analyze the risk impact on the critical path.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.B: Leo thang quá sớm khi PM chưa thử các biện pháp trong phạm vi quyền hạn; chỉ escalate khi vượt quyền hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Implement the new approach to capture the potential one-week schedule acceleration.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Assess the task's schedule float and analyze the risk impact on the critical path.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: A project has a budgeted cost of $120,000
According to the schedule, 15% of the project should have been completed after one month
After a month, only 12% of the project has actually been completed What is the scheduled performance index (SPI)
822.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support B: B
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Estimate Costs — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (0.6) does not resolve the stem focus — B (0.8) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (0.9) does not resolve the stem focus — B (0.8) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (1.25) does not resolve the stem focus — B (0.8) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do first
During sprint planning, an agile team and product owner committed to completing five user stories based on their velocity and capacity
However, during the sprint, the team began working on additional stories beyond the planned scope but did not finish any stories by the end of the sprint
The team seems confused about priorities, and stakeholders are worried about the absence of deliverables
This pattern has developed over the last two sprints
823.signalAnswer: Stem signals (ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support A: Facilitate a retrospective to identify root causes and process improvement opportunities.
whyBullets: A is correct: PM facilitate thảo luận để team/stakeholder cùng giải quyết — Build an empowered culture.
PMBOK 8: Manage Stakeholder Engagement — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "ưu tiên theo giá trị / MVP" không giải quyết ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum — đáp án đúng cần facilitate retrospective / phân tích root cause.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Review the team's definition of done and ensure consistent understanding across members.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Facilitate a retrospective to identify root causes and process improvement opportunities.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Implement work-in-progress limits to prevent the team from starting additional stories.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Facilitate a retrospective to identify root causes and process improvement opportunities.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
The project manager must define the project scope statement and weigh the expected value of the deliverables against the performance indices
824.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support D: Document the scope items in percentages to help measure how much expected value is achieved.
whyBullets: D is correct: Ghi nhận/tài liệu hóa quyết định và kết quả — hỗ trợ traceability và lessons learned.
PMBOK 8: Define Scope — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Thay đổi phạm vi cần quy trình change control và thống nhất stakeholder — không phải phản ứng mặc định khi gặp trở ngại.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Provide detailed descriptions of all scope components so that exactly what is being included is) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Document the scope items in percentages to help measure how much expected value is achieved.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Make all assumptions and constraints explicit so that the scope has a realistic foundation.) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Document the scope items in percentages to help measure how much expected value is achieved.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: After several iterations, the project manager feels that although the team is completing the work as planned, they are not entirely comfortable with some of the agile processes used in the project
When should the project manager talk about this and make adjustments
825.signalAnswer: Stem signals (ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support C: At the next retrospective meeting.
whyBullets: C is correct: Vấn đề lặp lại/quality — retrospective phân tích root cause và cải tiến hệ thống, không blame cá nhân.
PMBOK 8: Manage Project Execution — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (At the next daily coordination meeting.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (At the next retrospective meeting.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.B: Ghi nhận lessons learned / cập nhật log là quan trọng nhưng thường là bước sau khi đã xử lý tình huống — không phải hành động ưu tiên khi câu hỏi hỏi FIRST/NEXT. (Câu hỏi hỏi ACTION — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "Agile ceremony / iteration event" không giải quyết ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum — đáp án đúng cần facilitate retrospective / phân tích root cause.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager review to address this concern
Midway through a project, the project manager reports that actual costs are in line with the budget
However, members of the steering committee expressed concern that the team might be behind schedule, despite the budget appearing acceptable
826.signalAnswer: Stem signals (trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule) support B: B
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Develop Team — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Cost performance index (CPI)) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Schedule variance (SV)) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Estimate to complete (ETC)) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Schedule variance (SV)) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Earned value (EV)) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Schedule variance (SV)) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
In the most recent sprint review meeting, the client announced that they need to implement two of the five modules committed for the project in a few weeks
827.signalAnswer: Stem signals (ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support C: Conduct a release plan meeting.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Manage Stakeholder Engagement — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Conduct a brainstorming meeting.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Conduct a release plan meeting.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Use the nominal group technique.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Conduct a release plan meeting.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Use prototypes to refine the design.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Conduct a release plan meeting.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What action should the project manager have taken to address stakeholder concerns and mitigate impacts on the project’s timeline and budget
What action should the project manager have taken to address stakeholder concerns and mitigate impacts on the project’s timeline and budget?
828.signalAnswer: Stem signals (stakeholder không hài lòng / kỳ vọng lệch) support C: Incorporate resilience into the project management approach to help anticipate, respond to, and recover from risks.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Manage Stakeholder Engagement — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Enhance risk management by scheduling regular team meetings and ensuring clear communication wi) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Incorporate resilience into the project management approach to help anticipate, respond to, and) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.B: Ghi nhận lessons learned / cập nhật log là quan trọng nhưng thường là bước sau khi đã xử lý tình huống — không phải hành động ưu tiên khi câu hỏi hỏi FIRST/NEXT. (Câu hỏi hỏi ACTION — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Develop a collaborative problem-solving process to eliminate risk, ambiguity, and uncertainty f) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Incorporate resilience into the project management approach to help anticipate, respond to, and) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do next to improve collaboration and project outcomes
A project manager is leading a global project with team members from various countries and cultural backgrounds
829.signalAnswer: Mistaken email to the entire global project team with critical feedback — FIRST: acknowledge the mistake and apologize publicly for unintended consequences (Lead accountably).
whyBullets: A is correct: Email gửi nhầm toàn team kèm critical feedback — PM acknowledge mistake và apologize công khai (Lead accountably), không ignore, không bắt xóa mail, không chỉ xin lỗi riêng người nhận.
PMBOK 8: Manage Stakeholder Engagement — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Leo thang quá sớm khi PM chưa thử các biện pháp trong phạm vi quyền hạn; chỉ escalate khi vượt quyền hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Schedule mandatory weekly virtual meetings at the same time each week to ensure attendance.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Facilitate a team session to co-create roles, communication protocols, and decision-making guid) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "chỉ đạo cứng / ra lệnh" không giải quyết lỗi truyền thông / thông tin sai — đáp án đúng cần cùng phát triển giải pháp / collaborate.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
Regional governance inconsistencies are creating uncertainty about escalation responsibilities, with some teams acting quickly and others delaying until risks increase
Senior leadership requests recommendations for consistent escalation without excessive centralization
830.signalAnswer: Stem signals (mức độ uncertainty cao) support A: Establish a unified governance model with defined decision authority, escalation points, and boundaries for regional customization.
whyBullets: A is correct: Leo thang khi vấn đề vượt quyền PM hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên — sau khi đã thử xử lý trong phạm vi.
PMBOK 8: Identify Risks — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Leo thang quá sớm khi PM chưa thử các biện pháp trong phạm vi quyền hạn; chỉ escalate khi vượt quyền hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên.
