excludeReasons.D: Option D (Implement broad risk mitigation actions across the project to reduce risk exposure uniformly.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Reassess risk exposure, refine response strategies, and act on risks that exceed defined thresh) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
As the transformation initiative advances, teams face repeated obstacles, such as slow decision-making, unclear escalation paths, and conflicting priorities, which together hinder progress
Some leaders advise teams to bypass these issues for speed, while others favor more frequent escalations to resolve them
Senior leadership seeks guidance on managing impediments efficiently without excessive escalation
852.signalAnswer: Stem signals (xung đột trong team hoặc stakeholder; mức độ uncertainty cao) support B: Identify recurring blockers, address root causes, and refine decision and escalation processes.
whyBullets: B is correct: Leo thang khi vấn đề vượt quyền PM hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên — sau khi đã thử xử lý trong phạm vi.
PMBOK 8: Develop Team — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "đảm bảo tuân thủ / compliance" không giải quyết xung đột trong team hoặc stakeholder — đáp án đúng cần leo thang lên cấp trên.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Report ongoing issues to senior leadership for faster resolution and increased accountability.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Identify recurring blockers, address root causes, and refine decision and escalation processes.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Leo thang quá sớm khi PM chưa thử các biện pháp trong phạm vi quyền hạn; chỉ escalate khi vượt quyền hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
Two weeks after go-live, rural drivers complain more, and late deliveries rise, even though fuel savings improve
853.signalAnswer: Stem signals (trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule) support C: Review pilot and incident data to find root causes, consult stakeholders, and suggest rollout plan changes.
whyBullets: C is correct: PM tra artifact/plan đã có (tài liệu dự án) để quyết định có căn cứ, không phản ứng tùy hứng.
PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "tiếp tục theo kế hoạch hiện tại" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần tham chiếu artifact / kế hoạch đã có.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Immediately cancel the project and revert to the old routing method to stabilize operations.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Review pilot and incident data to find root causes, consult stakeholders, and suggest rollout p) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Have the dispatch supervisor handle local complaints so the project manager can focus on the na) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Review pilot and incident data to find root causes, consult stakeholders, and suggest rollout p) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
During testing, the project team discovers that fees for certain legacy products are bundled in ways that might not meet the new standard
854.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support C: Coordinate with compliance and product teams to adjust system changes and update scope.
whyBullets: C is correct: PM phối hợp trực tiếp với bên liên quan để giải quyết vấn đề — collaboration thay vì chỉ đạo một chiều.
PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "tiếp tục theo kế hoạch hiện tại" không giải quyết Continue with the plan, addressing any problems through customer service if complaints arise. — đáp án đúng cần phối hợp với bên liên quan.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Remove all legacy products from the system until a comprehensive new fee strategy is developed.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Coordinate with compliance and product teams to adjust system changes and update scope.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "leo thang lên cấp trên" không giải quyết Ask the sponsor to sign a waiver acknowledging the compliance risk so the project can stay on schedule. — đáp án đúng cần phối hợp với bên liên quan.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
The technical lead indicates the change could affect integrations and require additional testing
855.signalAnswer: Stem signals (trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule) support D: Use the change control process to evaluate impacts, share options with the client, and get formal approval.
whyBullets: D is correct: Thay đổi scope/plan phải qua change control: đánh giá impact, approval — không tự ý implement.
PMBOK 8: Manage Project Execution — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Sửa plan trước khi submit/đánh giá change request.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Reject the change immediately to protect the baseline scope and avoid further client requests.) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Use the change control process to evaluate impacts, share options with the client, and get form) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Tell the technical lead to implement the change only if it doesn't affect the schedule or budge) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Use the change control process to evaluate impacts, share options with the client, and get form) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
After three reporting cycles, some regional teams still submit old formats, and portfolio dashboards show inconsistent data quality
The executive sponsor wants to see demonstrable improvement in the next quarter
856.signalAnswer: Stem signals (vấn đề chất lượng / defect; stakeholder/phòng ban mới muốn tham gia truyền thông dự án) support B: Collect feedback on key issues, adjust guidance, and offer support to boost adoption and data quality.
whyBullets: B is correct: Stakeholder mới xuất hiện giữa chừng Executing — PM phải perform stakeholder analysis, xác định nhu cầu thông tin/báo cáo, rồi update communications management plan cho phù hợp.
PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Leo thang quá sớm khi PM chưa thử các biện pháp trong phạm vi quyền hạn; chỉ escalate khi vượt quyền hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Abandon the new templates and let each team choose its report format, as long as deadlines are) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Collect feedback on key issues, adjust guidance, and offer support to boost adoption and data q) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Email all teams to remind them that the new templates are required and include the rollout pres) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Collect feedback on key issues, adjust guidance, and offer support to boost adoption and data q) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
The quality committee wants to expand the process, and the project manager sees further improvement opportunities
857.signalAnswer: Stem signals (vấn đề chất lượng / defect) support C: Record weekend discharge delays as improvement opportunities, test changes, and update procedures based on results.
whyBullets: C is correct: PM chờ / trì hoãn để xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi — phù hợp miền Scope + Schedule, Focus Area Executing (PMBOK 8).
PMBOK 8: Define Scope — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Close the project since its original goal has been met, and assign any future enhancements to t) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Record weekend discharge delays as improvement opportunities, test changes, and update procedur) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Propose a new project focused solely on weekend processes without reviewing the current data in) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Record weekend discharge delays as improvement opportunities, test changes, and update procedur) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: "Request that the quality committee approve current results and postpone …" cùng nhóm chờ / trì hoãn nhưng lệch trọng tâm — "Record weekend discharge delays as improvement opportunities, test chang…" sát vấn đề chất lượng / defect hơn.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
Midway through an agile product development project, the team identifies recurring defects tied to unclear acceptance criteria
A retrospective highlights similar issues from two prior projects that were previously documented in the repository
858.signalAnswer: Stem signals (vấn đề chất lượng / defect; ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support B: Request a quality management plan change using repository insights to strengthen acceptance criteria practices.
whyBullets: B is correct: Embed quality: kiểm soát/prevent defect sớm, không để quality fail ở cuối pipeline.
PMBOK 8: Develop Team — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "ghi nhận / cập nhật risk register" không giải quyết vấn đề chất lượng / defect — đáp án đúng cần đảm bảo chất lượng / kiểm soát quality.
excludeReasons.C: Leo thang quá sớm khi PM chưa thử các biện pháp trong phạm vi quyền hạn; chỉ escalate khi vượt quyền hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Expand the number of test cycles in order to detect additional defects before the next schedule) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Request a quality management plan change using repository insights to strengthen acceptance cri) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
An agile project is in its first of 12 iterations, and each iteration lasts two weeks
In the first iteration review meeting, the stakeholders requested monthly reports instead of attending regular iteration reviews
859.signalAnswer: Stem signals (ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support C: Coach stakeholders on agile principles and help them understand the value of attending iteration review meetings.
whyBullets: C is correct: PM coach/phát triển năng lực thay vì thay thế hoặc đánh giá/punish — phát triển bền vững.
PMBOK 8: Manage Stakeholder Engagement — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Survey the stakeholders and request their preferred alternative reporting methods.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Coach stakeholders on agile principles and help them understand the value of attending iteratio) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "thừa nhận lỗi và giải trình minh bạch" không giải quyết ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum — đáp án đúng cần coaching / phát triển năng lực.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "Agile ceremony / iteration event" không giải quyết ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum — đáp án đúng cần coaching / phát triển năng lực.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do while waiting for approval
During the execution of a project, the project manager realizes that the initial estimates were unrealistic and that the project will take significantly longer to complete
860.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support C: Reprioritize project deliverables to enable phased delivery in increments.
whyBullets: C is correct: PM ưu tiên theo business value/MVP — deliver giá trị sớm thay vì làm tất cả features cùng lúc.
PMBOK 8: Develop Schedule — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Divide the project team into subgroups focusing on different components.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Reprioritize project deliverables to enable phased delivery in increments.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "yêu cầu team hành động (chưa rõ facilitation)" không giải quyết Ask the team to work overtime to try to meet the original delivery deadline. — đáp án đúng cần ưu tiên theo giá trị / MVP.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Update the project schedule baseline to reflect more realistic estimates.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Reprioritize project deliverables to enable phased delivery in increments.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: During planning of a predictive project, a high‑impact, high‑probability risk is identified: a key supplier might deliver a critical component late, causing significant schedule delay
Which is the best risk response strategy for the project manager to use
861.signalAnswer: Stem signals (trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule; vấn đề vendor / procurement) support B: Mitigate risk by tightening delivery terms and adding liquidated damages to the contract.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Monitor Risks — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "chờ / trì hoãn" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "chờ / trì hoãn" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "quản lý vendor / procurement" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
Ongoing regulatory updates and stakeholder input are resulting in multiple change requests that impact delivery timelines, risks, and resource allocation
Senior leadership is concerned about maintaining control without hindering progress and seeks advice on managing the situation
862.signalAnswer: Stem signals (stakeholder không hài lòng / kỳ vọng lệch; yêu cầu thay đổi phạm vi/kế hoạch) support C: Consolidate proposed changes and assess their cumulative impact before presenting options.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Manage Project Execution — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "change control / change request" không giải quyết stakeholder không hài lòng / kỳ vọng lệch — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Temporarily defer change decisions until delivery commitments are clearly at risk.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Consolidate proposed changes and assess their cumulative impact before presenting options.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Leo thang quá sớm khi PM chưa thử các biện pháp trong phạm vi quyền hạn; chỉ escalate khi vượt quyền hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do to manage remaining uncertainty and stakeholder expectations

The analysis shows a 75% probability of meeting the original go‑live date with added resources and fast‑tracking. What should the project manager do to manage remaining uncertainty and stakeholder expectations?
863.signalAnswer: Stem signals (mức độ uncertainty cao) support B: Explain the forecast's probabilistic nature, outline residual risks, and specify the contingency plan for unexpected defect levels.
whyBullets: B is correct: Embed quality: kiểm soát/prevent defect sớm, không để quality fail ở cuối pipeline.
PMBOK 8: Identify Risks — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Commit to the sponsor that the original date will be met because the probability is high.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Explain the forecast's probabilistic nature, outline residual risks, and specify the contingenc) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: "Remove all contingency from the schedule to maximize effort on testing a…" cùng nhóm đảm bảo chất lượng / kiểm soát quality nhưng lệch trọng tâm — "Explain the forecast's probabilistic nature, outline residual risks, and…" sát mức độ uncertainty cao hơn.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Present only the 75% probability of meeting the original go‑live date figure to avoid confusing) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Explain the forecast's probabilistic nature, outline residual risks, and specify the contingenc) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do

During design, the project manager identifies that the forecasting algorithm does not account for seasonal demand spikes, and the risk analyst flags this as a potential risk to holiday sales performance
864.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support A: Record forecasting risks, estimate their impact with stakeholders, and develop response options.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Estimate Costs — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "tiếp tục theo kế hoạch hiện tại" không giải quyết Proceed with the current design and rely on store managers to manually adjust orders during peak seasons. — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "chờ / trì hoãn" không giải quyết Redesign the entire forecasting module immediately, even if it delays the project significantly. — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Have the risk analyst monitor post-implementation results informally, since the team is already) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Record forecasting risks, estimate their impact with stakeholders, and develop response options) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
The marketing director worries about losing exposure, while the finance team advises against price matching
The CEO asks the project manager if the launch strategy should be changed
865.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support A: Work with stakeholders to review external competition, assess its effect on launch assumptions, and suggest an adjusted rollout plan.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: PMI kỳ vọng PM chủ động và có trách nhiệm (Lead accountably), không bỏ qua vấn đề hay giả định mọi người tự hiểu.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "chờ / trì hoãn" không giải quyết Immediately postpone the launch by several months to allow time for a comprehensive redesign of the app, incorporating additional features. — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Reduce the app's price by 50% so it is equal to or lower than the competitor's promotional pric) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Work with stakeholders to review external competition, assess its effect on launch assumptions,) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
After reviewing the lessons learned log from the previous event, they identify a recurring issue that may happen again
866.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support A: Identify the root cause and consult with stakeholders.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Manage Project Execution — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Option B (Address the issue if it comes up during event planning.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Identify the root cause and consult with stakeholders.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Recommend rescheduling the upcoming conference.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Identify the root cause and consult with stakeholders.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Implement the same strategies used in the last event.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Identify the root cause and consult with stakeholders.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do first
However, in recent iterations, the project manager has noticed that the technical lead is disengaged, delivering incomplete work, and not participating in collaborative sessions
Other team members have also noticed the shift and have raised concerns during retrospectives
867.signalAnswer: Stem signals (ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support D: Meet with the technical lead to thoroughly explore the cause and provide support for re-engagement.
whyBullets: D is correct: PM trao đổi trực tiếp để hiểu vấn đề và cùng tìm hướng xử lý — trước khi sửa baseline hay escalate.
PMBOK 8: Develop Team — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Leo thang quá sớm khi PM chưa thử các biện pháp trong phạm vi quyền hạn; chỉ escalate khi vượt quyền hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Adjust workload assignments to reduce pressure and help recover motivation.) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Meet with the technical lead to thoroughly explore the cause and provide support for re-engagem) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Reassign the technical lead’s responsibilities to avoid a negative impact on project performanc) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Meet with the technical lead to thoroughly explore the cause and provide support for re-engagem) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do to support successful adoption
Some departments resist the change, arguing that “agile is only for software” and that their work cannot be managed adaptively
868.signalAnswer: Stem signals (ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support D: Work with leadership and affected departments to tailor adaptive practices to their context, demonstrate benefits, and share lessons learned
whyBullets: D is correct: Ghi nhận/tài liệu hóa quyết định và kết quả — hỗ trợ traceability và lessons learned.
PMBOK 8: Manage Project Execution — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Enforce the same agile framework and ceremonies across all departments without modification to) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Work with leadership and affected departments to tailor adaptive practices to their context, de) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.B: PMI kỳ vọng PM chủ động và có trách nhiệm (Lead accountably), không bỏ qua vấn đề hay giả định mọi người tự hiểu.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Return to predictive methods for non-software departments to avoid conflict and maintain produc) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Work with leadership and affected departments to tailor adaptive practices to their context, de) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: The agreed solution allows a standardized core layout with limited pre‑approved variations, staying within a 5% cost increase and no schedule impact
How should the project manager best handle this outcome from a project control perspective
869.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support A: Initiate the formal change control process to record the design approach, adjust scope and cost if required, and secure governance approval.
whyBullets: A is correct: Thay đổi scope/plan phải qua change control: đánh giá impact, approval — không tự ý implement.
PMBOK 8: Manage Project Execution — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Implements change mà không formal approval.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "ghi nhận / cập nhật risk register" không giải quyết Immediately update only the risk register since the schedule remains unchanged. — đáp án đúng cần change control / change request.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "tham chiếu artifact / kế hoạch đã có" không giải quyết Cancel the project and request a new business case reflecting the design change. — đáp án đúng cần change control / change request.

signalPhrases: What can the project manager do to assess each organization's culture and help team members embrace the inevitable changes resulting from the merger
What can the project manager do to assess each organization's culture and help team members embrace the inevitable changes resulting from the merger?
870.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support D: Consider the unique characteristics of each team’s culture and tailor communication to maximize engagement.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "team building / hoạt động nhóm" không giải quyết Offer team-building exercises, such as role-play, to demonstrate the other company's organizational culture. — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Develop a program to implement change gradually, assisting team members in slowly adapting to t) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Consider the unique characteristics of each team’s culture and tailor communication to maximize) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Encourage team members to use dedicated communication platforms for real-time collaboration and) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Consider the unique characteristics of each team’s culture and tailor communication to maximize) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the new project manager do first
During the project's execution phase, the project manager is reassigned to another project
A new project manager takes over and quickly notices problems with the quality and scheduling of several deliverables
871.signalAnswer: Stem signals (vấn đề chất lượng / defect) support C: Meet with the project team to assess the situation and develop a plan to address the concerns.
whyBullets: C is correct: PM trao đổi trực tiếp để hiểu vấn đề và cùng tìm hướng xử lý — trước khi sửa baseline hay escalate.
PMBOK 8: Define Scope — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Rebaseline/sửa plan quá sớm — FIRST cần họp / thảo luận trực tiếp trước khi thay đổi baseline.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Review the project schedule and focus on delivering the project on time and within budget.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Meet with the project team to assess the situation and develop a plan to address the concerns.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "bổ sung nguồn lực / hire" không giải quyết vấn đề chất lượng / defect — đáp án đúng cần họp / thảo luận trực tiếp.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
As part of an agile approach, the team chooses Region X as the baseline to test the first iteration
872.signalAnswer: Stem signals (ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support A: Launch the product in Region X and plan future iterations to address noncompliance in other regions.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Define Scope — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Ghi nhận lessons learned / cập nhật log là quan trọng nhưng thường là bước sau khi đã xử lý tình huống — không phải hành động ưu tiên khi câu hỏi hỏi FIRST/NEXT. (Câu hỏi hỏi FIRST — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "đảm bảo tuân thủ / compliance" không giải quyết ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Connect with all regional sales teams and customers to reach an agreement on the existing desig) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Launch the product in Region X and plan future iterations to address noncompliance in other reg) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: A project manager is analyzing a potential risk that has a 30% probability of occurring
If the risk happens, it would result in an additional cost of $150,000
What is the expected monetary value (EMV) of this risk

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "thông báo / truyền đạt thông tin" không giải quyết ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum — đáp án đúng cần leo thang lên cấp trên.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Invite the project team to a swarming session to identify a solution.) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Escalate the issue to the project sponsor to determine the next steps.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "chờ / trì hoãn" không giải quyết ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum — đáp án đúng cần leo thang lên cấp trên.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do next to protect the project's outcomes and schedule
At the initial meeting for a road construction project, the project manager emphasized the importance of following all rules during project execution and stakeholder interactions
However, as the project progresses, some team members begin arriving late to meetings and disregarding other established ground rules
1081.signalAnswer: Stem signals (trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule) support A: Speak directly with the team members who have not followed the ground rules to address the issue.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Develop Schedule — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Option B (Consider reassigning team members who repeatedly violate established ground rules.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Speak directly with the team members who have not followed the ground rules to address the issu) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "khuyến khích bằng incentive/thưởng" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "trao quyền / để team tự quyết" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do next
However, most team members lack experience with the adaptive approach
1082.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support C: Provide training on adaptive principles and mindset for the current project team.
whyBullets: C is correct: PM coach/phát triển năng lực thay vì thay thế hoặc đánh giá/punish — phát triển bền vững.
PMBOK 8: Plan Resources — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Request that the project be reassigned to a team experienced in adaptive approaches.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Provide training on adaptive principles and mindset for the current project team.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Develop a plan to replace team members without experience in adaptive approaches.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Provide training on adaptive principles and mindset for the current project team.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Continue to use a predictive approach since the project team is experienced with it.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Provide training on adaptive principles and mindset for the current project team.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
During a design workshop for a new industrial robot, engineers raised concerns about the applicable safety and environmental protocols that must guide its operating procedures
1083.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support B: Provide the team with the organizational process assets and the project charter to guide compliance decisions.
whyBullets: B is correct: PM tra artifact/plan đã có (tài liệu dự án) để quyết định có căn cứ, không phản ứng tùy hứng.
PMBOK 8: Manage Project Execution — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "bổ sung nguồn lực / hire" không giải quyết Hire a specialized engineer with expertise in safety compliance to join and assist the design team. — đáp án đúng cần tham chiếu artifact / kế hoạch đã có.
excludeReasons.C: Ghi nhận lessons learned / cập nhật log là quan trọng nhưng thường là bước sau khi đã xử lý tình huống — không phải hành động ưu tiên khi câu hỏi hỏi FIRST/NEXT. (Câu hỏi hỏi ACTION — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Conduct a benchmark study with similar facilities to capture their operational compliance const) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Provide the team with the organizational process assets and the project charter to guide compli) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project managers do first
A country implements new laws with specific requirements for health and safety. The company's existing procedures haven't been updated yet
but management informed all project managers of the regulations. What should the project managers do first?
1084.signalAnswer: Stem signals (đạo đức / tuân thủ) support A: Review the possible impacts of the updated regulations on their projects.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Identify Risks — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "ghi nhận / cập nhật risk register" không giải quyết đạo đức / tuân thủ — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Request that the human resources department update its procedures.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Review the possible impacts of the updated regulations on their projects.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Ask the corporate office for guidance on determining the best course of action.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Review the possible impacts of the updated regulations on their projects.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do next
A project manager is working in a regulated industry, and the team is working on a project where the requirements are prioritized in a backlog
The project manager learns that the regulatory body for the project requires a prototype for inspection before the product can be launched
1085.signalAnswer: Stem signals (trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule; ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support A: Speak with the product owner to prioritize compliance activities in the backlog to submit a prototype to the regulatory body.
whyBullets: A is correct: PM trao đổi trực tiếp để hiểu vấn đề và cùng tìm hướng xử lý — trước khi sửa baseline hay escalate.
PMBOK 8: Define Scope — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "ưu tiên theo giá trị / MVP" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần họp / thảo luận trực tiếp.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "đảm bảo chất lượng / kiểm soát quality" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần họp / thảo luận trực tiếp.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "define MVP / minimum viable product" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần họp / thảo luận trực tiếp.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do next
Stakeholders have conflicting views on the necessity of full compliance and the potential risks of not meeting all requirements
1086.signalAnswer: Stem signals (xung đột trong team hoặc stakeholder; đạo đức / tuân thủ) support A: Lead a discussion with stakeholders to confirm the need for compliance and highlight the risks of non-compliance.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Option B (Review the stakeholder register to find individuals with the authority and influence to resolve) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Lead a discussion with stakeholders to confirm the need for compliance and highlight the risks) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Leo thang quá sớm khi PM chưa thử các biện pháp trong phạm vi quyền hạn; chỉ escalate khi vượt quyền hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Propose removing select compliance elements to balance cost, complexity, and stakeholder expect) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Lead a discussion with stakeholders to confirm the need for compliance and highlight the risks) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do first
While planning a global solution delivery in a multinational organization, the project manager and team drafted all work items and defined the priorities and methodologies for implementation

During one of the daily meetings, a team member raises concerns about the compliance of the technology being used and suggests an alternative that better aligns with the country's data privacy policies
1087.signalAnswer: Stem signals (đạo đức / tuân thủ) support B: Assess the validity of the concern and evaluate the compliance of the current and newly proposed technology.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Develop Team — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Ask the architecture owner to assess the team member's proposal and evaluate the compliance con) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Assess the validity of the concern and evaluate the compliance of the current and newly propose) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "engagement stakeholder / làm rõ kỳ vọng" không giải quyết đạo đức / tuân thủ — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Obtain support from the information technology (IT) department regarding the feasibility of the) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Assess the validity of the concern and evaluate the compliance of the current and newly propose) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
After the acquisition, the parent company issued a mandatory directive requiring all ongoing and future projects to fully comply with updated health, safety, and environmental (HSE) regulations
Several projects are already underway, with critical deadlines approaching, and project teams are unsure how the new requirements will impact deliverables, resources, and budgets
1088.signalAnswer: Stem signals (trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule; yêu cầu thay đổi phạm vi/kế hoạch) support D: Work with the HSE team to assess the impacts and revise the plan as needed.
whyBullets: D is correct: Trước khi đồng ý thay đổi, PM đánh giá impact lên scope/schedule/cost/risk — không quyết định mù quáng.
PMBOK 8: Perform Integrated Change Control — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "chờ / trì hoãn" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần sửa kế hoạch / baseline / schedule.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Request that the HSE department assign a specialist to the team.) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Work with the HSE team to assess the impacts and revise the plan as needed.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "set expectations / thống nhất kỳ vọng và yêu cầu" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần sửa kế hoạch / baseline / schedule.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do next
The development team has been following the project management plan and the scope defined in the project charter
During a product review meeting, a stakeholder raises concerns about adding new features, which were not part of the original project scope but are now urgent for the stakeholder
1089.signalAnswer: Stem signals (stakeholder không hài lòng / kỳ vọng lệch) support A: Review the requested changes with the team and initiate the formal change control process if needed.
whyBullets: A is correct: Thay đổi scope/plan phải qua change control: đánh giá impact, approval — không tự ý implement.
PMBOK 8: Develop Team — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "thông báo một chiều (inform/notify)" không giải quyết stakeholder không hài lòng / kỳ vọng lệch — đáp án đúng cần change control / change request.
excludeReasons.C: Rebaseline/sửa plan quá sớm — NEXT cần change control / change request trước khi thay đổi baseline.
excludeReasons.D: "Submit a change request to the change control board and notify the proje…" cùng nhóm change control / change request nhưng lệch trọng tâm — "Review the requested changes with the team and initiate the formal chang…" sát stakeholder không hài lòng / kỳ vọng lệch hơn.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
During a predictive project, the project manager is finalizing the exit criteria for a large-scale system development effort
At this point, a stakeholder responsible for risk and compliance notifies the project manager that a new deliverable must be added due to recently passed legislation
The request introduces potential delays in the scheduled go-live date
1090.signalAnswer: Stem signals (đạo đức / tuân thủ) support B: Work with the stakeholder to document the request and initiate a formal change request.
whyBullets: B is correct: Thay đổi scope/plan phải qua change control: đánh giá impact, approval — không tự ý implement.
PMBOK 8: Manage Stakeholder Engagement — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Hold a meeting with stakeholders to clarify that the request is not part of the defined exit cr) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Work with the stakeholder to document the request and initiate a formal change request.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Leo thang quá sớm khi PM chưa thử các biện pháp trong phạm vi quyền hạn; chỉ escalate khi vượt quyền hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Record the legal requirement as a risk and monitor it since it falls outside the original scope) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Work with the stakeholder to document the request and initiate a formal change request.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
As the team prepares to start validation testing, the test lead challenges the established acceptance criteria, stating that they are incomplete or unclear
The project manager wants to address the concern without causing unnecessary delay
1091.signalAnswer: Stem signals (mức độ uncertainty cao) support A: Evaluate the concern and submit a formal change request if criteria updates are required.
whyBullets: A is correct: Thay đổi scope/plan phải qua change control: đánh giá impact, approval — không tự ý implement.
PMBOK 8: Perform Integrated Change Control — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "đảm bảo chất lượng / kiểm soát quality" không giải quyết mức độ uncertainty cao — đáp án đúng cần change control / change request.
excludeReasons.C: Bỏ qua change request — scope creep hoặc stakeholder bị bỏ qua.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Discuss potential impacts and persuade the test lead to accept the current test conditions.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Evaluate the concern and submit a formal change request if criteria updates are required.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should have been done to avoid this situation
Country A requested a modification to the product to better support its sustainability initiatives, and the project manager for the deployment in Country A approved the change
When the new version of the product was received in Country B, it failed quality and acceptance testing because it did not meet Country B's government regulations
1092.signalAnswer: Stem signals (vấn đề chất lượng / defect; đạo đức / tuân thủ) support C: Analyze change requests at a global level before implementing them across countries.
whyBullets: C is correct: Thay đổi scope/plan phải qua change control: đánh giá impact, approval — không tự ý implement.
PMBOK 8: Define Scope — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: "Prevent authorization of change requests during multi-country deployment…" cùng nhóm change control / change request nhưng lệch trọng tâm — "Analyze change requests at a global level before implementing them acros…" sát vấn đề chất lượng / defect hơn.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Require all relevant countries to align their regulations to a common baseline.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Analyze change requests at a global level before implementing them across countries.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Require that countries requesting changes fund impact assessments for all countries.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Analyze change requests at a global level before implementing them across countries.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
A project manager reviews the project status with the team and notices that a vendor resource can be released earlier than scheduled
The project manager checks the schedule, confirms this change, and notifies the vendor
The vendor argues that the resource must remain on the project for the initially agreed-upon duration
1093.signalAnswer: Stem signals (vấn đề vendor / procurement) support D: Review the contract terms to understand obligations and negotiate an amended release schedule.
whyBullets: D is correct: PM chủ động engagement stakeholder: làm rõ kỳ vọng, nhu cầu thông tin và thống nhất hướng xử lý.
PMBOK 8: Manage Project Execution — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Leo thang quá sớm khi PM chưa thử các biện pháp trong phạm vi quyền hạn; chỉ escalate khi vượt quyền hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Conduct a stakeholder impact analysis to determine the optimal approach for transitioning resou) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Review the contract terms to understand obligations and negotiate an amended release schedule.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Ghi nhận lessons learned / cập nhật log là quan trọng nhưng thường là bước sau khi đã xử lý tình huống — không phải hành động ưu tiên khi câu hỏi hỏi FIRST/NEXT. (Câu hỏi hỏi ACTION — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
During execution, the customer submits a change request to maintain the project's business value, which has been threatened by a recently implemented government regulatory change
The project manager analyzes the change, which will require 50% of the project deliverables to be reworked and will incur additional costs to the customer
1094.signalAnswer: Stem signals (vấn đề chất lượng / defect; yêu cầu thay đổi phạm vi/kế hoạch) support C: Submit the change request to the change control board (CCB) with a detailed rationalization and a cost-impact analysis.
whyBullets: C is correct: Thay đổi scope/plan phải qua change control: đánh giá impact, approval — không tự ý implement.
PMBOK 8: Manage Stakeholder Engagement — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: "Submit the change request to the change control board (CCB), indicating …" cùng nhóm change control / change request nhưng lệch trọng tâm — "Submit the change request to the change control board (CCB) with a detai…" sát vấn đề chất lượng / defect hơn.
excludeReasons.B: "Submit the change request to the change control board (CCB) and advise r…" cùng nhóm change control / change request nhưng lệch trọng tâm — "Submit the change request to the change control board (CCB) with a detai…" sát vấn đề chất lượng / defect hơn.
excludeReasons.D: "Submit the change request to the change control board (CCB), indicating …" cùng nhóm change control / change request nhưng lệch trọng tâm — "Submit the change request to the change control board (CCB) with a detai…" sát vấn đề chất lượng / defect hơn.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
A risk was identified at the beginning of an agile project and a mitigation plan was established
The risk event occurs, but the impact is much higher than anticipated and the originally planned response will be ineffective
The project team developed a more effective response, but it is drastically different from the original mitigation plan and must be implemented as soon as possible
1095.signalAnswer: Stem signals (ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support B: Update the risk management plan and implement the newly created response.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Monitor Risks — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Implement only the initial response as outlined in the risk management plan.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Update the risk management plan and implement the newly created response.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Defer risk response until the next progress meeting to inform stakeholders.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Update the risk management plan and implement the newly created response.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "thông báo một chiều (inform/notify)" không giải quyết ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do first
During the execution of a development project, a team member informs the project manager that the operating system installation will be delayed because the supplier has postponed a critical upgrade
This delay could affect subsequent activities and the overall project timeline
1096.signalAnswer: Stem signals (vấn đề vendor / procurement) support A: Assess how the delay impacts the project schedule and deliverables.
whyBullets: A is correct: PM chờ / trì hoãn để xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi — phù hợp miền Schedule + Stakeholders, Focus Area Executing (PMBOK 8).
PMBOK 8: Develop Schedule — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Option B (Update the project schedule to reflect the new installation date.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Assess how the delay impacts the project schedule and deliverables.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "thông báo / truyền đạt thông tin" không giải quyết vấn đề vendor / procurement — đáp án đúng cần chờ / trì hoãn.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "cùng phát triển giải pháp / collaborate" không giải quyết vấn đề vendor / procurement — đáp án đúng cần chờ / trì hoãn.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do next
A project manager receives a complaint that the team did not respond appropriately to a client's request
However, the project manager is aware that the team has been receiving multiple out-of-scope requests from the client
1097.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support C: Review the scope with the client and ensure all requests are documented and processed as change requests.
whyBullets: C is correct: Thay đổi scope/plan phải qua change control: đánh giá impact, approval — không tự ý implement.
PMBOK 8: Manage Project Execution — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "khuyến khích collaboration / hợp tác" không giải quyết Encourage the team members to ask the "five whys" during their communications with the client. — đáp án đúng cần change control / change request.
excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "thông báo / truyền đạt thông tin" không giải quyết Ask the client to provide a clearer explanation of the requests and issues they shared with the team. — đáp án đúng cần change control / change request.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Request to be included in all future communications between the project team members and the cl) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Review the scope with the client and ensure all requests are documented and processed as change) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: The team is currently testing the new functionality when a key stakeholder proposes a change
The proposed change can offer significant benefits and improve customer satisfaction, but it also requires more resources
What actions should the project manager take
1098.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support C: Document the proposed changes and assess any impact on time, cost, and resources.
whyBullets: C is correct: Ghi nhận/tài liệu hóa quyết định và kết quả — hỗ trợ traceability và lessons learned.
PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "họp / thảo luận trực tiếp" không giải quyết Stop the testing and schedule a meeting to review the proposed changes with the resources. — đáp án đúng cần ghi nhận / tài liệu hóa.
excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "đảm bảo chất lượng / kiểm soát quality" không giải quyết Reject the proposed change and proceed with the functionality testing as scheduled. — đáp án đúng cần ghi nhận / tài liệu hóa.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "trao quyền / để team tự quyết" không giải quyết Postpone the proposed changes and allow the team to complete the testing and implementation activities. — đáp án đúng cần ghi nhận / tài liệu hóa.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do next
During a product acceptance test for a project, the project sponsor tells the project manager that the deliverable will only pass if the theme color is changed from red to blue
The project manager reviewed the planning documents and confirmed that the theme color should be red
The sponsor insists that the color be changed to blue
1099.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support A: Suggest that the project sponsor submit a formal change request to change the requirement for the theme.
whyBullets: A is correct: Thay đổi scope/plan phải qua change control: đánh giá impact, approval — không tự ý implement.
PMBOK 8: Manage Stakeholder Engagement — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "thông báo một chiều (inform/notify)" không giải quyết Inform the project sponsor to accept the theme, as the contract clearly states it should be red. — đáp án đúng cần change control / change request.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Agree with the project sponsor and change the theme color as requested to avoid potential confl) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Suggest that the project sponsor submit a formal change request to change the requirement for t) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "quản lý vendor / procurement" không giải quyết Request that procurement change the theme color to blue to align with the project sponsor's expectations. — đáp án đúng cần change control / change request.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
A hospital is updating its protocols to comply with new federal regulations requiring changes in technology and staff training
The project manager has completed a change impact gap analysis and documented how systems and roles will be affected
1100.signalAnswer: Stem signals (đạo đức / tuân thủ) support B: Evaluate corporate culture to identify norms and behaviors that could affect protocol adoption.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Manage Project Execution — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "coaching / phát triển năng lực" không giải quyết đạo đức / tuân thủ — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Submit revised protocols to the organization's project management office for review.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Evaluate corporate culture to identify norms and behaviors that could affect protocol adoption.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Create a dashboard to track compliance milestones across the organization's departments.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Evaluate corporate culture to identify norms and behaviors that could affect protocol adoption.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do first
A project manager is leading a product development project in its fifth sprint
1101.signalAnswer: Stem signals (ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support C: Seek support from the project sponsor and initiate appropriate change management procedures.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Perform comparative product analysis to identify similarities and differentiation opportunities) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Seek support from the project sponsor and initiate appropriate change management procedures.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "khuyến khích collaboration / hợp tác" không giải quyết ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.D: Ghi nhận lessons learned / cập nhật log là quan trọng nhưng thường là bước sau khi đã xử lý tình huống — không phải hành động ưu tiên khi câu hỏi hỏi FIRST/NEXT. (Câu hỏi hỏi FIRST — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do to address the potential obsolescence of deliverables
A project manager is currently overseeing a hybrid project that has specific scope and quality requirements
However, due to recent changes in a competitor's product, there is a growing concern that the project's deliverables may become obsolete by the time the project is complete
1102.signalAnswer: Stem signals (vấn đề chất lượng / defect) support B: Assess the impact of the competitor's product changes and seek approval from the change control board (CCB) to address them.
whyBullets: B is correct: Trước khi đồng ý thay đổi, PM đánh giá impact lên scope/schedule/cost/risk — không quyết định mù quáng.
PMBOK 8: Develop Team — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Perform a comprehensive business impact analysis and explore options for using alternative mate) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Assess the impact of the competitor's product changes and seek approval from the change control) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Implements change mà không formal approval.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Terminate the current project and initiate a new project that better aligns with the evolving c) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Assess the impact of the competitor's product changes and seek approval from the change control) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do first
A project is 90% complete when a major new government policy change is announced
The policy change will delay the project by six months and add US$2M in compliance costs
The current contract includes penalty clauses for late delivery, and the client is threatening to take legal action
Key team members are assigned to other upcoming projects, and keeping the team will cost US$500,000 per month
1103.signalAnswer: Stem signals (trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule; đạo đức / tuân thủ) support A: Conduct comprehensive impact analysis of all options including costs, risks, and implications.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Manage Project Execution — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "change control / change request" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.C: Tập trung "engagement stakeholder / làm rõ kỳ vọng" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.D: Leo thang quá sớm khi PM chưa thử các biện pháp trong phạm vi quyền hạn; chỉ escalate khi vượt quyền hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
A project manager is managing an upgrade from an old system to a new version. Halfway through the upgrade
the older system failed to upgrade and could not be restored. What should the project manager do?
1104.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support C: Evaluate the impacts of the failure and communicate them to relevant stakeholders.
whyBullets: C is correct: Trước khi đồng ý thay đổi, PM đánh giá impact lên scope/schedule/cost/risk — không quyết định mù quáng.
PMBOK 8: Define Scope — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Abandon the old system and instruct the team to expedite work on other deliverables.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Evaluate the impacts of the failure and communicate them to relevant stakeholders.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Request additional time to restore the old system while continuing with the project.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Evaluate the impacts of the failure and communicate them to relevant stakeholders.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Instruct the team to continue working, as they are not responsible for the old system.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Evaluate the impacts of the failure and communicate them to relevant stakeholders.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do first to resolve this issue
A key vendor providing specialized API integration components for an agile project is two weeks behind schedule due to unexpected security compliance issues
This delay impacts eight user stories across the next three sprints and jeopardizes a contractual milestone, which could incur a US$50,000 penalty clause
The current vendor requests additional funds for security remediation, and switching vendors would require four weeks of knowledge transfer and onboarding
The product owner is pressing to remove security features from the scope, but regulatory requirements demand their inclusion
1105.signalAnswer: Stem signals (trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule; vấn đề vendor / procurement) support A: Perform a thorough impact analysis of all resolution options, including costs and implications.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Develop Team — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "engagement stakeholder / làm rõ kỳ vọng" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Facilitate stakeholder alignment on trade-offs between scope, timeline, and compliance.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Perform a thorough impact analysis of all resolution options, including costs and implications.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "quản lý vendor / procurement" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
During a project team meeting, several potential risks are identified
The sponsor requests a follow-up meeting to understand which risks require the most attention and how they may impact project objectives
The project manager wants to prioritize the risks before the meeting and determine which ones warrant further analysis
1106.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support A: Conduct a qualitative risk analysis to assess the probability and impact.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Monitor Risks — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Option B (Perform quantitative analysis to calculate overall risk exposure.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Conduct a qualitative risk analysis to assess the probability and impact.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Use a Monte Carlo simulation to model schedule sensitivity.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Conduct a qualitative risk analysis to assess the probability and impact.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "ghi nhận / cập nhật risk register" không giải quyết Risk đã trigger — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do first
Just before delivering the final two components, the supplier notifies the project manager that prices must be renegotiated, or they will withhold shipment
1107.signalAnswer: Stem signals (vấn đề vendor / procurement) support D: Review the current contract for clauses concerning pricing adjustments and renegotiation rights.
whyBullets: D is correct: PM chủ động engagement stakeholder: làm rõ kỳ vọng, nhu cầu thông tin và thống nhất hướng xử lý.
PMBOK 8: Manage Project Execution — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "quản lý vendor / procurement" không giải quyết vấn đề vendor / procurement — đáp án đúng cần engagement stakeholder / làm rõ kỳ vọng.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (Engage with new vendors to assess the feasibility of quickly sourcing the remaining components.) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Review the current contract for clauses concerning pricing adjustments and renegotiation rights) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: "Agree to renegotiate revised pricing with the supplier to avoid project …" cùng nhóm engagement stakeholder / làm rõ kỳ vọng nhưng lệch trọng tâm — "Review the current contract for clauses concerning pricing adjustments a…" sát vấn đề vendor / procurement hơn.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do to ensure effective ongoing risk management
An agile team has established a comprehensive risk register during project initiation
The team has completed three sprints of development and is encountering evolving technical challenges and shifting market conditions
1108.signalAnswer: Stem signals (ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support B: Schedule regular risk review meetings with the team and stakeholders to reevaluate impact and likelihood.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Identify Risks — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Tập trung "facilitate retrospective / phân tích root cause" không giải quyết ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Use an automated risk monitoring software with scheduled alerts and stakeholder notifications.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Schedule regular risk review meetings with the team and stakeholders to reevaluate impact and l) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "Agile ceremony / iteration event" không giải quyết ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
During a progress meeting, the project team learns that a previously identified risk has materialized
The project manager decides to execute the risk response plan, but the contingency reserve does not cover the total budget for that plan
1109.signalAnswer: Stem signals (rủi ro đã/sắp xảy ra) support C: Initiate a formal change request to modify the scope, cost, and schedule baselines to support the plan.
whyBullets: C is correct: Thay đổi scope/plan phải qua change control: đánh giá impact, approval — không tự ý implement.
PMBOK 8: Monitor Risks — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Request management reserve funding from the project sponsor to cover any remaining costs.) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Initiate a formal change request to modify the scope, cost, and schedule baselines to support t) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.B: Yêu cầu team tự xử lý — PM vẫn chịu trách nhiệm facilitate; đáp án đúng: change control / change request.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Use the available contingency reserve and explore options to reduce the scope of the remaining) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Initiate a formal change request to modify the scope, cost, and schedule baselines to support t) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do first
The supplier notifies the project team that the materials will not reach the site on time due to a customs clearance delay that will affect the critical path
1110.signalAnswer: Stem signals (vấn đề vendor / procurement) support B: Review the risk register and implement the respective risk response.
whyBullets: B is correct: PM tra artifact/plan đã có (risk register) để quyết định có căn cứ, không phản ứng tùy hứng.
PMBOK 8: Develop Schedule — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Ask the logistics team for strategies to expedite the clearance.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Review the risk register and implement the respective risk response.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Ghi nhận lessons learned / cập nhật log là quan trọng nhưng thường là bước sau khi đã xử lý tình huống — không phải hành động ưu tiên khi câu hỏi hỏi FIRST/NEXT. (Câu hỏi hỏi FIRST — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "quản lý vendor / procurement" không giải quyết vấn đề vendor / procurement — đáp án đúng cần tham chiếu artifact / kế hoạch đã có.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do

These ambiguities may affect the ability to meet the agreed deadline
1111.signalAnswer: Stem signals (trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule; mức độ uncertainty cao) support A: Engage stakeholders to clarify vague requirements and focus on high-priority needs.
whyBullets: A is correct: PM chủ động engagement stakeholder: làm rõ kỳ vọng, nhu cầu thông tin và thống nhất hướng xử lý.
PMBOK 8: Develop Schedule — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "change control / change request" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần engagement stakeholder / làm rõ kỳ vọng.
excludeReasons.C: Ghi nhận lessons learned / cập nhật log là quan trọng nhưng thường là bước sau khi đã xử lý tình huống — không phải hành động ưu tiên khi câu hỏi hỏi FIRST/NEXT. (Câu hỏi hỏi ACTION — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "bổ sung nguồn lực / hire" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần engagement stakeholder / làm rõ kỳ vọng.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do to enhance the risk identification process
During the initial risk identification process, the internal team identified standard technical and schedule risks
However, stakeholders are concerned about potential integration challenges and regulatory compliance issues that the team may not fully understand
The project has tight deadlines and a limited budget
1112.signalAnswer: Stem signals (trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule; stakeholder không hài lòng / kỳ vọng lệch) support A: Engage external subject matter experts to validate identified risks and uncover additional vulnerabilities.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Monitor Risks — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Option B (Conduct additional brainstorming sessions with the team to identify more comprehensive risk sce) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Engage external subject matter experts to validate identified risks and uncover additional vuln) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Ghi nhận lessons learned / cập nhật log là quan trọng nhưng thường là bước sau khi đã xử lý tình huống — không phải hành động ưu tiên khi câu hỏi hỏi FIRST/NEXT. (Câu hỏi hỏi ACTION — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Schedule individual interviews with key stakeholders to gather their specific concerns about pr) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Engage external subject matter experts to validate identified risks and uncover additional vuln) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
An agile team is planning for a 2-week iteration
During the last few iterations, the product owner made changes and reprioritized features, which affected the team's deliverables
1113.signalAnswer: Stem signals (ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support C: Discuss the changes with the product owner and assess the impact of making changes late in a sprint.
whyBullets: C is correct: Trước khi đồng ý thay đổi, PM đánh giá impact lên scope/schedule/cost/risk — không quyết định mù quáng.
PMBOK 8: Define Scope — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Leo thang quá sớm khi PM chưa thử các biện pháp trong phạm vi quyền hạn; chỉ escalate khi vượt quyền hoặc cần quyết định cấp trên.
excludeReasons.B: PMI kỳ vọng PM chủ động và có trách nhiệm (Lead accountably), không bỏ qua vấn đề hay giả định mọi người tự hiểu.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Remind the team that an agile approach supports change, so they must still meet deliverables on) does not resolve the stem focus — C (Discuss the changes with the product owner and assess the impact of making changes late in a sp) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: some of which depend on specific deliverables from others. What will the project manager do?
A project manager is overseeing multiple interconnected projects
1114.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support A: Identify and document all interconnected project dependencies.
whyBullets: A is correct: Ghi nhận/tài liệu hóa quyết định và kết quả — hỗ trợ traceability và lessons learned.
PMBOK 8: Define Scope — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Option B (Adjust interconnected project timelines to remove dependencies.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Identify and document all interconnected project dependencies.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Remove all potential dependencies between the interconnected projects.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Identify and document all interconnected project dependencies.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "tiếp tục theo kế hoạch hiện tại" không giải quyết Ensure that all interconnected projects can move forward independently. — đáp án đúng cần ghi nhận / tài liệu hóa.

signalPhrases: What should the agile project manager do first
A critical deadline is approaching, and a specialized team member has just learned they must be away from the office for two weeks
They have only about three working days remaining and will be completely unavailable during their absence
1115.signalAnswer: Stem signals (trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule; ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support B: Identify critical tasks and dependencies that may be affected.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Develop Schedule — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Adjust the project plan and timeline to accommodate the absence.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Identify critical tasks and dependencies that may be affected.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Introduce a replacement resource for the leaving team member.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Identify critical tasks and dependencies that may be affected.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "yêu cầu team hành động (chưa rõ facilitation)" không giải quyết trễ tiến độ / áp lực schedule — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.

signalPhrases: During team meetings, several team members complain that they struggle to concentrate due to a noisy work environment
several team members complain that they struggle to concentrate due to a noisy work environment. Who is responsible for solving this problem by creating a more conducive work environment?
1116.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support D: The project manager
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (The project sponsor) does not resolve the stem focus — D (The project manager) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.B: Option B (The team members) does not resolve the stem focus — D (The project manager) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (The product owner) does not resolve the stem focus — D (The project manager) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do next
The sponsor has indicated that the budget does not support training for the project team
1117.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support B: Use benchmarks to identify best practices and critical knowledge.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Identify Stakeholders — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: Option A (Gather suggestions about improvement strategies from stakeholders.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Use benchmarks to identify best practices and critical knowledge.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Assign team members to colleagues to shadow on other projects.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Use benchmarks to identify best practices and critical knowledge.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Option D (Conduct workshops with experts and integrate insights into planning.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Use benchmarks to identify best practices and critical knowledge.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do next
The team needs to define how the change will affect systems, processes, and roles
The project manager has completed a change readiness assessment and identified deficiencies in stakeholder trust and empowerment regarding the centralization
1118.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support A: Perform a gap analysis to identify areas of disruption and adaptation across the organization.
whyBullets: PMBOK 8: Manage Project Execution — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "đảm bảo tuân thủ / compliance" không giải quyết Transfer readiness assessment findings into the corporate repository for audit compliance. — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Host a leadership roundtable with critical stakeholders to discuss implementation timelines.) does not resolve the stem focus — A (Perform a gap analysis to identify areas of disruption and adaptation across the organization.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Tập trung "coaching / phát triển năng lực" không giải quyết Design a training module to support the upcoming system rollout to prepare for the change. — đáp án đúng cần xử lý trực tiếp trọng tâm câu hỏi.

signalPhrases: What should the project manager do
During plan development, the sponsor insists on keeping project governance informal for efficiency, while the project management office (PMO) requires formal governance standards
The PMO warns that bypassing governance documentation may expose the organization to audit risks
1119.signalAnswer: Stem signals (scenario cues) support D: Establish the project governance framework according to organizational standards.
whyBullets: D is correct: PM đảm bảo tuân thủ policy/regulation — Governance và Lead accountably.
PMBOK 8: Manage Project Execution — aligns with this scenario.

excludeReasons.A: "Implement an informal governance structure as preferred by the project s…" cùng nhóm đảm bảo tuân thủ / compliance nhưng lệch trọng tâm — "Establish the project governance framework according to organizational s…" sát vấn đề trong đề bài hơn.
excludeReasons.B: Tập trung "chờ / trì hoãn" không giải quyết Delay governance design decisions until the end of plan development. — đáp án đúng cần đảm bảo tuân thủ / compliance.
excludeReasons.C: Option C (Request that the legal department resolve the issue before proceeding.) does not resolve the stem focus — D (Establish the project governance framework according to organizational standards.) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

signalPhrases: What should the organization change to improve agile resource planning

An organization is adopting an agile approach to fulfill customer requirements. The organization previously worked with specialized resources and project managers assigned to the project for a set period. What should the organization change to improve agile resource planning?
1120.signalAnswer: Stem signals (ngữ cảnh Agile/Scrum) support B: The team should include both generalists and specialists who can adapt to evolving requirements.

excludeReasons.D: Option D (The project team should restrict customer involvement to prevent disruptions and confusion.) does not resolve the stem focus — B (The team should include both generalists and specialists who can adapt to evolving requirements) is the PMBOK-aligned action.

excludeReasons.D: Ghi nhận lessons learned / cập nhật log là quan trọng nhưng thường là bước sau khi đã xử lý tình huống — không phải hành động ưu tiên khi câu hỏi hỏi FIRST/NEXT. (Câu hỏi hỏi NEXT — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)

As a result, key stakeholders have raised concerns about whether current work processes still align with the documented quality expectations

whyBullets: B is correct: PM đảm bảo tuân thủ policy/regulation — Governance và Lead accountably.

excludeReasons.C: Option C (Based on stakeholder concerns, integrate new tools and techniques for assurance and control int) does not resolve the stem focus — B (Perform a quality audit to evaluate adherence to defined processes and identify opportunities f) is the PMBOK-aligned action.
excludeReasons.D: Ghi nhận lessons learned / cập nhật log là quan trọng nhưng thường là bước sau khi đã xử lý tình huống — không phải hành động ưu tiên khi câu hỏi hỏi FIRST/NEXT. (Câu hỏi hỏi FIRST — đây không phải bước ưu tiên.)

signalPhrases: An alternative dispute resolution (ADR) method that involves direct discussions between parties to resolve disputes without third-party intervention

An alternative dispute resolution (ADR) method that involves direct discussions between parties to resolve disputes without third-party intervention. Select the term that best matches the definition from the drop-down list below.
